description:
At TalentPop, we help eCommerce brands scale with world-class customer support — and we’re growing fast. We’re looking for a resourceful and detail-driven Email Marketing Assistant to join our team. This role blends email coordination, community engagement, and administrative support — perfect for someone who’s organized, marketing-aware, and comfortable working behind the scenes.

What You'll Do


 * Assist with the setup and scheduling of email campaigns (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar)
 * Organize campaign assets, contact lists, and segment updates
 * Track performance data and compile clear reports for internal teams
 * Maintain SOPs, campaign checklists, and shared resources
 * Support return trends tracking by analyzing return portal data and organizing findings
 * Respond to community engagement via DMs, ad comments, and customer threads
 * Collaborate with account managers on marketing updates and ad-hoc admin tasks
 * Research competitive campaigns and trends when needed
   
   

What We're Looking For


 * At least 1 year of experience in email marketing, digital coordination, or admin support
 * Proficient in Excel or Google Sheets, with strong attention to data and detail
 * Familiarity with email marketing tools and project management platforms like Asana or ClickUp
 * Strong communication skills — you write clearly and collaborate well across teams
 * Ability to manage shifting priorities with calm and clarity
 * Bonus points if you’ve worked with SEO, PPC, or content writing
   
   

Technical Requirements


 * A laptop or desktop with at least an i5 processor (or Mac equivalent)
 * A reliable internet connection with at least 15 Mbps download/upload speed
 * A quiet, dedicated workspace
   
   

What We Offer


 * 100% remote work — work from where you’re most comfortable
 * Health and dental insurance (or a health stipend based on location)
 * Annual salary reviews and raises based on your performance
 * Paid time off to support work-life balance
 * Growth opportunities within our team
 * Access to learning tools, regular feedback, and a people-first culture
 * Flexible working hours — we focus on results, not micromanagement
   
   

If you’re excited to build systems that support marketing at scale, and want to grow with a company that values your work — we’d love to meet you.

Important: To be considered for this position, please make sure to include the following application code in your submission: EMS25. This code helps us quickly identify applicants for the Email Marketing Assistant role. Applications submitted without this code may experience delays in processing. Be sure to highlight it clearly when you apply so our recruitment team knows you’ve carefully read the job posting.

Apply now and let’s build something great together.
title: Email Marketing Assistant

description:
Stop Taking Orders. Start Driving Sales. Join the Frontline of E-Commerce Growth.

Join TalentPop – Where Top Performers Thrive

Are you ready to move beyond basic customer service? TalentPop is redefining customer engagement by turning every interaction into a potential revenue stream. We are seeking a Remote Client Conversion Specialist—an empathetic yet results-focused professional who can skillfully manage the customer journey, recover lost sales, and build lasting value for global e-commerce brands. This is your chance to secure a stable, high-growth remote career with predictable annual raises and an emphasis on work-life harmony.

IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: APPLICATION FAST-TRACK!

To ensure your application is reviewed by the **Recruitment Team**, you must follow these critical steps exactly. **Applications that do not choose 'Brand Concierge' and enter the correct code WILL NOT be reviewed.**


 * When selecting the position during your application, please choose “Brand Concierge” from the list of available roles.
 * In the application form, you’ll be asked for an application code – please enter BCS in that field.
   
   

What Makes This Role Unique

This role is the perfect blend of customer advocacy and sales expertise. You operate as a dedicated Brand Concierge, maximizing customer loyalty and spending through proactive, intelligent outreach.

Your Responsibilities


 * Sales Recovery: Strategically re-engage customers who abandoned their shopping carts, providing personalized solutions and incentives to complete their purchase.
 * Customer Journey Management: Guide buyers seamlessly through the post-purchase and consideration phases using targeted email and chat interactions.
 * Product Expertise: Become a trusted advisor, offering tailored recommendations that increase the value of every transaction.
 * Efficient Problem-Solving: Handle customer inquiries and minor troubleshooting with speed and precision, maintaining a high standard of client trust.
   
   

Why You Will Thrive at TalentPop

We believe stability and security should come standard with high performance.


 * Career Security and Raises: Benefit from competitive pay that comes with **guaranteed annual performance-based increases**. We grow, and you grow with us.
 * Robust Benefits Package: Choose between comprehensive Health and Dental Insurance or a generous monthly Health Stipend. Plus, enjoy **Holiday Bonuses**.
 * Unrivaled Flexibility: 100% fully remote work and generous Paid Time Off (PTO) give you the control you need to succeed professionally and personally.
 * Clear Advancement: High performers are prioritized for **unlimited opportunities for growth and promotion** into leadership roles.
   
   

Requirements For Success


 * Minimum 1 Year E-commerce Customer Service/Support Experience (via chat/email is highly preferred).
 * Strong Persuasion Skills and a verifiable track record of converting leads or recovering sales.
 * Experience using tools like Shopify or customer relationship management (CRM) software.
 * Reliable remote setup (i5+ computer, 15+ Mbps internet, professional workspace).
   
   

Ready to Redefine E-commerce Success?

If you're ready for a career where your efforts directly impact major brand revenue, we want to hear from you. **Apply now!**
title: Remote Client Conversion Specialist

description:
Our mission is to provide exceptional technology services to OMG agencies.

Established in 2013, Omnicom Media Group Nepal is a software company in Nepal and a subsidiary of OmnicomMediaGroup Australia - ranked top in media agencies in Australia.




We are a team of around 300+ professionals who are involved in design, development, testing and maintenance of software projects developed in latest technologies. Besides that, our people are also involved in Programmatic projects which involves conversion of business.




Our core competency is Software development in the latest stack of technologies, Business Intelligence, Programmatic and Delivering Finance Function tasks.




We strive to go “above and beyond” through our culture of continuous development and improvement and has embedded those into our company values:

 * We are all in this together
 * Lead from the back/everyone is a boss
 * Continuous Improvement & Development
 * Open and Honest Communication is vital
 * Everyone has access to all information




About this role/ Role Overview




As an SEO Analyst, you will play a vital role in driving organic search success for our clients. You will be responsible for executing, analyzing, and optimizing SEO strategies, ensuring that all SEO initiatives are implemented effectively to improve search visibility and meet performance objectives.




Your expertise in SEO best practices, data analysis, and performance optimization will be essential in delivering high-quality campaigns. You will collaborate with multiple teams to enhance website rankings, traffic, and engagement while staying ahead of industry trends.




Key Responsibilities

Task Execution & Campaign Support

· Implement on-page and off-page SEO strategies to improve rankings and visibility.

· Collaborate with account managers to align SEO activities with business goals.

· Work closely with internal teams to deliver best-in-class SEO and content marketing campaigns.

· Conduct technical SEO audits, keyword research, and metadata optimization following industry best practices.




Performance Analysis & Reporting

· Monitor and analyze SEO performance metrics, including organic traffic, keyword rankings, and user engagement.

· Generate detailed reports with insights and recommendations to improve SEO performance.

· Identify trends and optimization opportunities through data-driven insights.




Leadership & Collaboration

· Build strong relationships with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless collaboration.

· Work closely with other departments to understand the impact of different media channels on organic search performance.

· Provide daily direction, management, leadership, and guidance to direct reports (if applicable).

· Manage priorities and resources effectively to optimize workload across projects.




Knowledge Management

· Stay updated on client, competitor, and industry changes, sharing key insights with the team and organization.

· Contribute to internal knowledge-sharing sessions and refine presentation skills through active participation.

· Proactively seek opportunities for professional growth and increased responsibility.




Account Management & Project Execution

· Participate in team scrums, retrospectives, and internal WIPs to drive efficiency.

· Manage multiple projects/accounts, ensuring timely execution and high-quality deliverables.

· Work with the account manager to develop and implement SEO strategies for various clients.

· Ensure compliance with company quality standards and best practice techniques.




Compliance & Quality Assurance

· Adhere to company guidelines and processes for SEO task execution.

· Review and double-check deliverables for accuracy and completeness before submission.

· Prioritize tasks based on urgency and deadlines to maintain workflow efficiency.




Learning & Development

· Stay up to date with SEO tools, algorithm updates, and industry trends through training and self-learning.

· Actively seek feedback to enhance technical skills and task execution efficiency.




Required Experience & Qualifications

· A degree in either marketing, IT, or digital.

· 1+ years of hands-on SEO experience, preferably in an agency setting.

· Proficiency in SEO tools (e.g., Google Analytics, SEMrush, Screaming Frog).

· Basic understanding of on-page/off-page SEO, keyword research, and technical audits.

· Ability to follow instructions and work effectively in a team environment.

· Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
title: Search Engine Optimization Analyst

description:
SEO Assistant (Remote) – Join the TalentPop Team!

At TalentPop, we’re passionate about helping eCommerce brands scale by delivering exceptional support and strategic expertise. We’re currently looking for a detail-oriented, data-driven, and creative SEO Assistant to join our growing remote team!

As our SEO Assistant, you’ll work closely with our SEO and Marketing teams to implement effective search engine optimization strategies that help our clients’ brands shine online. This is your opportunity to build your career in a fast-paced, people-first environment where your growth truly matters.

What You'll Love About Working With Us


 * Remote-first workplace that values work-life balance
 * Supportive, collaborative team culture with ongoing training
 * Career development opportunities and performance-based bonuses
 * Paid time off around holidays and annual performance increases
 * Health & dental insurance (or health stipends where applicable)
   
   

What You’ll Do


 * Conduct SEO audits, keyword research, and content optimization
 * Support backlink outreach and monitor site performance using Google Analytics
 * Manage product catalogs, site structure, and Shopify CMS
 * Use tools like Klaviyo to analyze customer behavior and engagement
 * Create reports and stay updated on SEO trends and best practices
   
   

Technical Requirements


 * Reliable internet connection with a minimum of 15 Mbps for both upload and download speed.
 * Personal PC or laptop with a minimum i5 processor.
   
   

What We’re Looking For


 * 1+ years of SEO experience in an eCommerce setting
 * Proficiency with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Analytics, and Excel
 * Experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, and Google Merchant Center (preferred)
 * Excellent writing skills; design experience (e.g., Canva) is a plus
 * Self-starter who thrives in a remote, fast-paced environment
   
   

If you're passionate about SEO, excited by data, and love helping brands grow, then we want to hear from you! At TalentPop, we believe in building strong, authentic teams—and you could be our next great addition.

description:
Job Title: Mid-Level SEO Analyst

Company: Varosa Technology Pvt. Ltd.

Location: Anamnagar, Kathmandu, Nepal

Employment Type: Full-time

Experience Level: 2–4 years

Department: Marketing / Growth

Reports To: Product Owner




Company Description

Varosa Technology Pvt. Ltd., established in 2017, provides comprehensive IT solutions under one roof. The company is driven by highly experienced professionals who specialize in delivering user-friendly, customized software development and consultancy services. Varosa Technology serves international clients across the USA, Qatar, and Australia, and is also involved in local and government projects in Nepal.




In addition to client services, Varosa develops and scales multiple in-house SaaS products, offering an exciting opportunity to work on both service-based and product-led SEO growth.

About the Role

We’re looking for a performance-focused Mid-Level SEO Analyst to help grow organic visibility for our in-house SaaS products. You’ll work closely with content, development, and product teams to improve rankings, traffic, and conversions across international and local markets.




Key Responsibilities

 * Conduct keyword research and search intent mapping for SaaS products and client websites
 * Optimize on-page SEO (meta tags, headers, internal linking, content structure)
 * Identify and fix technical SEO issues (crawlability, indexing, site speed, Core Web Vitals)
 * Collaborate with content writers and product teams to optimize landing pages and blog content
 * Perform SEO audits and create clear implementation roadmaps
 * Track performance using analytics and SEO tools; prepare reports for stakeholders
 * Analyze competitors and uncover organic growth opportunities
 * Support link-building and off-page SEO strategies
 * Monitor algorithm updates and adjust SEO strategies accordingly
 * Assist with international SEO for Australia and Nepal-based projects




Requirements

 * 2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience
 * Strong knowledge of on-page SEO, technical SEO, and basic off-page SEO
 * Experience using Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar tools
 * Working knowledge of HTML/CSS and basic JavaScript for SEO troubleshooting
 * Experience working with CMS platforms (WordPress)
 * Ability to analyze data and convert insights into actionable recommendations
 * Good communication/leadership skills and documentation habits




Nice to Have

 * Experience with SaaS SEO or B2B SEO
 * Experience with international SEO and geo-targeting
 * Knowledge of schema markup and structured data
 * Basic knowledge of SQL
 * Experience collaborating with product and dev teams
title: Mid-Level SEO Analyst

description:
Senior SEO Specialist

Type: Full-Time

Experience Level: Senior (5+ Years)

Location: Gaushala, Kathmandu

Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior SEO Specialist who views search engines as a puzzle and AI-driven discovery as a playground. You won’t just be "optimising keywords"; you will be architecting a holistic organic presence that spans traditional search, AI Overviews (SGE), and emerging discovery platforms.

The ideal candidate understands that SEO in 2026 is about Authority and Trust, not just backlinks and meta-tags. You’ll lead our organic strategy, ensuring our brand remains the definitive answer to our customers' most pressing questions.

Key Responsibilities

 * AI & SGE Strategy: Optimise content for AI-driven search results and LLM-based discovery to ensure our brand is cited as a primary source.
 * Technical SEO Excellence: Conduct deep-dive audits on site architecture, focusing on Interaction to Next Paint (INP), schema markup, and crawl efficiency for massive datasets.
 * Content Ecosystem Leadership: Collaborate with the content team to implement E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) at scale, moving beyond "SEO writing" to "Expert-led insights."
 * Competitive Intelligence: Use predictive analytics to stay ahead of algorithm shifts and competitor moves before they impact our traffic.
 * Data Orchestration: Build custom dashboards in Looker Studio or BigQuery to merge SEO data with actual business revenue, proving that organic growth is a profit center, not just a vanity metric.

Requirements & Tech Stack

 * Experience

5+ years in SEO with a proven track record of growing organic revenue (not just traffic).

 * Technical Skills

Proficient in Python or SQL for data analysis; advanced knowledge of JavaScript SEO.

 * Tools

Semrush/Ahrefs, Botify/Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, and AI-auditing tools.

 * Strategic Mindset

Ability to translate "we dropped in rankings" into a multi-departmental recovery plan.

 * Communication

You can explain the "why" behind a Core Update to a CEO without using jargon.

What Makes You the Perfect Fit?

"You don't just follow the Google documentation; you read between the lines. You understand that SEO is a long game, but you have the tactical chops to find 'quick wins' in a crowded digital marketplace."

 * You are comfortable working alongside developers to implement complex redirects or headless CMS optimisations.
 * You have a "test and learn" mentality, frequently running A/B tests on titles and schema to see what actually moves the needle.
 * You stay calm when the algorithm shifts because your strategy is built on user value, not loopholes.
title: Search Engine Optimization Specialist

description:
TalentPop is a fast-growing e-commerce company committed to offering a diverse range of products through our Shopify store and other marketplaces. As we continue to grow, we’re on the lookout for a skilled and motivated E-Commerce Listings & Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team. If you’re someone who excels in managing product listings and has a flair for digital marketing, we’d love to meet you!

What You’ll Do:


 * Keep our product listings up-to-date and engaging on Shopify and other marketplaces.
 * Help write and refine email content and product descriptions.
 * Leverage AI to streamline content creation and identify effective messaging.
 * Use your Excel skills to analyze data, track performance, and manage product information efficiently.
 * Assist in enhancing our SEO strategies and support our digital marketing efforts to increase visibility and drive traffic.
 * Manage and maintain a wide range of product lines and brands, ensuring consistency across all listings.
 * Review performance data to identify top products and reorganize listings accordingly.
   
   

What We’re Looking For:


 * Minimum of 1 year experience in e-commerce, focusing on managing product listings on Shopify and other marketplaces.
 * Strong Excel skills for effective data analysis and organization.
 * Excellent writing skills for crafting and editing product descriptions.
 * Solid understanding of SEO and digital marketing tactics.
   
   

Technical Requirements:


 * Reliable internet connection with a minimum of 15 Mbps for both upload and download speed.
 * Personal PC or laptop with a minimum i5 processor.
   
   

What We Offer:


 * Annual performance-based salary increases
 * Health and dental insurance coverage or a health stipend to support your health and well-being.
 * Paid Time Off
 * Holiday Bonus
 * Recognition and performance incentives
 * We're growing fast, which means more chances of advancement!
   
   

Technical Requirements:


 * Stable DSL, Cable, or Fiber internet connection (minimum 15 Mbps, LAN required)
 * Personal PC or laptop with a minimum i5 processor.
   
   

Important: To be considered for this position, please make sure to include the following application code in your submission: DMS25. This code helps us quickly identify applicants for the Listings and Digital Marketing Specialist role. Applications submitted without this code may experience delays in processing. Be sure to highlight it clearly when you apply so our recruitment team knows you’ve carefully read the job posting.

Ready to Join Us?

Become a part of TalentPop and help us drive our e-commerce success to new heights! We're excited to see what you’ll bring to the table.
title: E-Commerce Listings and Digital Marketing Specialist

description:
Company: Next Education Consultancy

Location: Kathmandu, Nepal


Job Summary

Next Education Consultancy is seeking a dynamic and result-oriented Marketing Manager to lead and execute marketing strategies that enhance brand awareness, generate student leads, and strengthen partnerships with international institutions. The ideal candidate should have strong leadership, communication, and strategic planning skills with experience in the education consultancy sector.


Key Responsibilities
 * Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies and campaigns (online & offline).
 * Plan and manage digital marketing activities (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Google Ads, SEO).
 * Lead student recruitment campaigns for countries like Australia, UK, USA, Canada, etc.
 * Organize and manage education fairs, seminars, and promotional events.
 * Build and maintain relationships with schools, colleges, and partner institutions.
 * Analyze market trends and competitor activities.
 * Manage marketing budget and track ROI of campaigns.
 * Oversee content creation (social media posts, brochures, website content).
 * Coordinate with counselors and admissions team to align marketing goals.
 * Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports for management.
   

Qualifications & Requirements
 * Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field (MBA preferred).
 * Minimum 2–4 years of marketing experience (education consultancy preferred).
 * Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools and platforms.
 * Excellent communication skills (English & Nepali).
 * Leadership and team management skills.
 * Analytical mindset with data-driven decision-making ability.
   

Skills Required
 * Strategic Planning
 * Branding & Lead Generation
 * Digital Campaign Management
 * Event Management
 * Negotiation & Partnership Building
 * CRM & Reporting Skills
   

What We Offer
 * Competitive salary + performance incentives
 * Growth opportunities in international education sector
 * Friendly and professional work environment

description:
Company Description


DTRG Network is a software company dedicated to enhancing Nepal's health system through its Electronic Hospital Recording and Management System. Developed entirely in Nepal, the software is designed to address the unique needs of hospitals in the region. By providing tailored solutions and technical support, DTRG Network strives to streamline hospital operations. The company is committed to making a positive impact on the healthcare sector with innovative technology and services.


Role Description


This is a full-time on-site role for a Digital Marketing Specialist, based in Kathmandu. The role involves planning and executing targeted digital marketing strategies to amplify the company’s online presence. Daily tasks will include managing social media channels, monitoring web analytics, optimizing marketing campaigns, and driving online engagement. The specialist will also work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment with overall brand and business goals.


Qualifications

 * Strong expertise in Social Media Marketing and Digital Marketing
 * Proficiency in Web Analytics and experience optimizing web campaigns
 * Proven skills in Online Marketing and audience engagement strategies
 * Excellent Communication skills, including written and verbal proficiency
 * Ability to work collaboratively in a team as well as independently
 * Relevant experience in the healthcare technology sector is a plus
 * Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field

Job Description

Ideal candidates for this position should be innovative, and web and multimedia savvy. Ultimately, the outstanding Digital Strategist should have a firm grasp of the various digital touchpoints, steer our organization's digital narrative, and drive highly effective digital campaigns.

Digital Strategist Responsibilities


 * Evaluate and implement improvements on digital strategy.
 * Research the latest digital tools and interactive trends.
 * Optimize SEO.
 * Create integrated and cost-effective digital strategies.
 * Drive value for the organization.
 * Analyze and report on digital campaigns.
 * Analyze customer and user data.
 * Engage with clients, sales teams, and management.

TalentPop is a fast-growing e-commerce support company dedicated to helping brands thrive in today’s digital landscape. As we expand, we’re looking for a creative and results-driven Social Media Marketing Specialist to join our team. If you’re passionate about building engaging online communities, driving brand awareness, and turning followers into customers, we’d love to meet you!

What You’ll Do


 * Develop and execute social media strategies across platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) to grow reach and engagement.

 * Monitor performance metrics and optimize campaigns based on insights.
 * Stay up-to-date on trends, competitor activity, and platform updates to keep our content fresh and relevant.
 * Collaborate with the marketing team on integrated campaigns, paid ads, and influencer partnerships.
 * Engage with our online community by responding to comments, messages, and fostering meaningful interactions.
 * Support email and digital marketing initiatives with social-first content ideas.
   
   

What We’re Looking For

 * Solid understanding of social media analytics and reporting.

 * Highly organized, creative, and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.
   
   

Technical Requirements

What We Offer

description:
Senior Consultant - Technology

Do you want to build the next great international consulting firm?

Meksys is driving digital transformation and redefining what’s possible for businesses across the globe. We are building the backbone that powers tomorrow’s most ambitious companies.

We're looking for a Senior Consultant who brings the strategic depth and client gravitas to match the technical excellence our teams already deliver.

Meksys is built by a rockstar team with 30+ years of international business experience, building and scaling digital applications to millions of users, and building and scaling global operations teams. This is a rare opportunity to join the next rocketship operating across all continents.

What You'll Do


 * Lead client engagements from discovery through delivery, translating ambiguous business problems into clear, actionable solutions
 * Act as strategic advisor to client stakeholders - shaping what gets built and why, not just how
 * Facilitate workshops, design sessions, and executive briefings that drive alignment and decisions
 * Define solution approaches, working models, and governance patterns in collaboration with engineering and product teams
 * Bridge client business needs with Meksys delivery teams, ensuring work is grounded in real outcomes
 * Develop and maintain trusted client relationships that generate long-term partnership and new opportunities
 * Support business development including RFP responses, proposals, and solution blueprinting
 * Conduct industry and client research to identify trends, risks, and opportunities for improvement
 * Produce high-quality strategic deliverables with emphasis on clarity, storytelling, and actionable recommendations
 * Contribute thought leadership and cross-industry perspective to clients and internally
 * Coach and mentor junior team members, helping them grow their client and consulting skills.
   
   

What You Bring


 * 5+ years in management consulting, enterprise software, or a client-facing advisory role
 * Proven ability to run discovery engagements, facilitate stakeholder workshops, and write recommendations that land
 * Fluency in enterprise application domains (ERP, HRM, workforce management, or similar)
 * Comfortable navigating both technical and business conversations with credibility
 * Strong written communication and deliverable quality. You raise the bar in every document you touch
 * Track record of building client trust and identifying new opportunities organically.

description:
At Ultra Tendency, we build intelligent software solutions that create real business impact. We combine strong engineering fundamentals with modern technologies — including AI-powered features — to deliver scalable systems for international clients across three continents.

We are looking for a Fullstack Engineer who enjoys building high-quality applications end-to-end and wants to grow in an international, collaborative environment.

What You’ll Do


 * Develop modern frontend applications using React and Next.js (TypeScript)
 * Build backend services with Python (FastAPI, Flask, or similar)
 * Design and integrate REST APIs
 * Contribute to AI/LLM-powered features and automation workflows
 * Translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions
 * Write clean, maintainable, production-ready code
 * Participate in code reviews and continuously improve engineering standards
 * Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the stack
   
   

You will work with international teams and have real ownership of your features.

What We’re Looking For


 * 3+ years of professional software development experience
 * Strong experience with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
 * Solid backend experience with Python and microservices
 * Experience integrating APIs
 * Independent and structured way of working
 * Clear and proactive communication in English
   
   

Nice to have:


 * Docker & CI/CD experience
 * Exposure to AI/LLM integrations
 * Experience in distributed teams
   
   

What We Offer


 * A global learning community across three continents
 * The opportunity to shape cutting-edge data and AI projects
 * Real ownership and visible impact on international client systems
 * Annual performance reviews focused on collaboration and growth
 * A personalized development plan and clear advancement opportunities
 * Paid certifications and unlimited Udemy Business access
 * Local, virtual, and global team events
   
   

If you’re motivated by building reliable systems, working in an international environment, and continuously improving your craft — we’d love to connect.

Apply now or reach out for a conversation.

ABOUT US

Ultra Tendency is an international premier Data Engineering consultancy for Big Data, Cloud, Streaming, IIoT and Microservices. We design, build, and operate large-scale data-driven applications for major enterprises such as the European Central Bank, HUK-Coburg, Deutsche Telekom, and Europe’s largest car manufacturer. Founded in Germany in 2010, UT has developed a reliable client base and now runs 8 branches in 7 countries across 3 continents.

We do more than just leverage tech, we build it. At Ultra Tendency we contribute source code to +20 open-source projects including Ansible, Terraform, NiFi, and Kafka. Our impact on tech and business is there for anyone to see. Enterprises seek out Ultra Tendency because we solve the problems others cannot.

We love the challenge: together, we tackle diverse and unique projects you will find nowhere else. In our knowledge community, you will be a part of a supportive network, not a hierarchy. Constant learning and feedback are our drivers for stable development. With us you can develop your individual career through work-life balance.



We evaluate your application based on your skills and corresponding business requirements. Ultra Tendency welcomes applications from qualified candidates regardless of race, ethnicity, national or social origin, disability, sex, sexual orientation, or age.

Data privacy statement: Data Protection for Applicants – Ultra Tendency

description:
About Leapfrog

Leapfrog is on a mission to be a role model technology company. Since 2010, we have relentlessly worked on crafting better digital products with our team of superior engineers. We’re a full-stack company specializing in SaaS products and have served over 100 clients with our mastery of emerging technologies.

We’re thinkers and doers, creatives and coders, makers and builders— but most importantly, we are trusted partners with world-class engineers. Hundreds of companies in Boston, Seattle, Silicon Valley, and San Francisco choose us to gain speed, agility, quality, and stability, giving them an edge over their competitors.

About The Role

At Leapfrog, our mission is to be a role model technology company. We want to be trusted partners, world-class engineers, and creative innovators for our clients. We have built well-crafted impactful software solutions for many industries and ecosystems.


 * Set up, maintain, and execute test documentation and standards.
 * Plan and perform end-to-end testing of high complexity features.
 * Creating and expanding automated regression tests.
 * Experienced with managing bug life cycle.
 * Work closely with development teams in an agile environment.
 * Serve as a liaison between developers and product owners, providing feedback on application readiness.
 * Set up a test environment, communicate testing progress, improvements, or corrections to the team throughout the development process.
 * Learn and gain expertise on various tools for performance and security.
 * Assist with production deployment, troubleshooting, and the release process.
 * Follow the company’s coding standards, policies, processes, and working culture.
 * Communicate new ideas, issues, status, and outcomes with supervisor/team and with clients as necessary.
 * Continuous research and learning; discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency.
 * Graduate in Computer Engineering or similar IT background or equivalent practical experience
 * Minimum 2 years of professional experience
 * Good understanding of software test methodologies, best practices and terminology
 * Proven experience utilizing both structured and exploratory testing techniques
 * Good knowledge of object oriented programming concepts
 * Strong desire to work in a quality focused environment, balancing multiple projects responsibilities concurrently with effectiveness and efficiency
 * Good analytical and problem solving abilities
 * Good written and verbal communication skills
 * Good knowledge of agile development methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
 * Good knowledge of UNIX, Gherkin, Jira, Git
 * Knowledge of OWASP security guidelines for web development
 * Knowledge of AWS, Jenkins, and other deployment tools.
   
   
   

🌞 Life at Leapfrog:


 * Work with talented engineers and remarkable professionals in Nepal, the US, and Europe, building state-of-the-art digital health products.
 * Have an amazing career growth plan with support from experienced mentors and unlimited learning opportunities.
 * Be a part of an experienced team—apply the best industry practices, get mentored by experienced professionals, and be ready to mentor the new ones.
 * Get exposure to clients who are leading entrepreneurs and startups from Silicon Valley.
 * Your work will be at the cutting edge of healthcare innovation and make a difference in the lives of thousands of people worldwide.
 * You will get the flexibility to work remotely or in the office— we value accountable freedom.
 * Get growth opportunities, not just in your work. We organize various internal initiatives where you can be a part of a bigger learning community with webinars, knowledge-sharing sessions (KSS), and internal conferences.
 * Be a part of a safe workplace where it’s okay to fail fast— get constructive feedback and grow as you move ahead.
 * Receive recognition for your contributions and the positive impact you create. We always look for opportunities to celebrate our efforts, play games, and have fun together!
 * You will have a lot of fun at Leapfrog— there’ll never be a dull day.
   
   
   

🎁 Benefits and perks:

We believe our people are our greatest strength. With perks and benefits, we intend to offer everything our people need to do their best while maintaining a healthy balance between work and personal life.

Daily Work Support


 * 🏠 Hybrid work: Work from office or home, depending on our flexible roster
 * 💻 Support for resources: Receive a monthly internet and laptop allowance, and request resources for convenient WFH.
 * 📆 5-day workweek: Enjoy weekends off and return refreshed on Mondays.
 * 🍔 Food: Access to healthy meals while on-site.
   
   
   

Professional Growth


 * 📚 'Growth mindset' fund: Investment in your post-grad degree, learning opportunities, and career growth.
 * 👶 Child scholarship: Scholarships for your child in selected schools.
 * 📈 Bi-annual bonus: Get timely festival and company bonuses.
 * 💸 Advance salary: Request salary in advance.
   
   
   

Work/Life Balance


 * ✈️ Paid time-offs: Annual, sick, compensation, and bereavement leaves.
 * 🍼 Maternity leave: 3 months of paid leave, 1 month of unpaid leave, and 90 days of reduced workload.
 * 🐣 Paternity leave: 11 days of paid paternity leave and reduced workload after.
 * 💊 Menstruation leave: 6 days of paid menstruation leave annually.
   
   
   

We take care of you


 * 🌿 Your well-being: Company-funded counseling services from certified therapists as well as COVID care services.
 * 💰 Retirement fund: Social security fund with health and accidental insurance.
   
   
   

Celebrating your efforts


 * 🎉 Engagement and Events: Team lunch/dinner, company outings, and festival celebrations with your favorite co-workers!
 * 😎 Exposure: Visit and work in the States and build better client rapport.
 * 💖 Recognition: In-house awards, appreciation platforms, and 5th-anniversary gifts!

description:
We’re looking for a reliable Back-end Developer to build and enhance modern, high‑quality backend services using C#, ASP.NET Core with solid experience in ORMs such as Entity Framework Core or Dapper. In this role, you’ll design and implement RESTful APIs, improve data workflows, and ensure strong system performance across our platform. You’ll work closely with cross‑functional partners to deliver clean, maintainable backend logic powered by efficient SQL and robust data access patterns. Experience with search technologies like Elasticsearch is a plus but not required. If you enjoy building clear, scalable backend systems and contributing to steady, high‑quality technical improvement, we’d love to meet you.

What You’ll Do


 * Build New Features: Collaborate with Product Managers, Frontend Developers, and fellow Backend Engineers to design and implement new features that enhance functionality, performance, and user experience across our core applications.
 * Modernize Our Architecture: Help lead the transformation of our existing monolithic application into a modern, scalable, service-oriented architecture. You’ll have the opportunity to influence key architectural decisions and implement services that are robust, secure, and maintainable.
 * Embrace Quality & Scale: Contribute to a codebase that’s clean, well-documented, and covered by tests. You’ll write scalable code with a focus on performance, fault-tolerance, and long-term maintainability.
 * Solve Meaningful Problems: Work on real-world challenges in safety, compliance, and operations that have a measurable impact on our customers’ businesses and the well-being of their employees.
 * Thrive in a Supportive Culture: Be part of a small, collaborative engineering team where your ideas are heard, your contributions matter, and your growth is supported.
   
   

Skills You’ll Need


 * C# & ASP.NET Core Expertise: Strong experience building and maintaining backend services and web APIs using C# and ASP.NET Core.
 * API Design & Integration: Solid understanding of REST principles with hands‑on experience designing, integrating, and consuming APIs in production environments.
 * SQL & Database Skills: Ability to write efficient, optimized SQL queries and work confidently with relational databases to ensure performance and data integrity.
 * ORM & Data Access: Good experience with Entity Framework Core or Dapper for data access patterns.
 * Testing: Strong experience in writing unit tests using any of the standard testing frameworks (e.g., MSTest, NUnit, or xUnit).
 * Search Technologies (Nice to Have): Exposure to Elasticsearch or similar search technologies is beneficial but not required.
 * Communication & Collaboration: Strong ability to explain technical decisions, discuss trade‑offs, and work cross‑functionally to deliver reliable backend solutions.
   
   

What You’ll Get


 * Leadership & Growth: Work directly with senior leadership, reporting to the CTO, in an autonomous and entrepreneurial culture with zero bureaucracy.
 * Remote Work & Flexibility: Frontline is a fully distributed organization.
 * Competitive Compensation

description:
About the Role

You will be one of the first core engineers building an AI platform that lets vendors rapidly create and deploy conversational AI agents (avatars, chat, voice) across websites, LinkedIn, email, and more. The product is in MVP with ~7 microservices in production; you will extend and harden the platform, design new services, and work on cutting-edge AI/agent capabilities.




Key Responsibilities




 * Design, develop, and maintain Kotlin/Spring Boot microservices on JVM
 * Build and evolve the AI engine and agent orchestration (conversational agents, avatars, chat, voice)
 * Implement and optimize RAG pipelines (semantic, lexical, and knowledge-graph based)
 * Integrate and experiment with LLMs (Gemini, open-source/Hugging Face, etc.)
 * Work on infrastructure-level pieces (new microservices, internal tooling, web agents, observability, performance)
 * Use AI tools (Claude, Copilot/Codex, etc.) throughout the development lifecycle (design, coding, code review)
 * Collaborate with product/UX on requirements and translate them into robust, scalable systems
 * Participate in architecture, design reviews, and technical decision-making
 * Own features end-to-end: from design and implementation to deployment and monitoring
 * Conduct R&D on new AI and agentic capabilities and bring them into production




Must-Have Qualifications




 * Strong professional experience with Kotlin on the JVM
 * Solid hands-on experience with Spring Boot microservices
 * Deep understanding of system design, distributed systems, and cloud architectures (preferably GCP)
 * Experience building production-grade backend services (clean code, testing, observability, performance)
 * Comfortable working with databases and caching (e.g., MongoDB, Redis)
 * Familiarity with LLMs and AI development workflows (prompting, evaluation, integration)
 * Experience building with any agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen)
 * Proven ability to use AI tools (e.g., Claude) as part of the development process, including AI-assisted code review
 * Strong ownership, proactivity, and ability to deliver in a fast-paced environment
 * Excellent communication skills and a team-player mindset
 * Comfortable with ambiguity and R&D-style work (problem spaces not fully specified, no ready-made solutions)




Nice-to-Have Experience with:




 * Neo4j or other graph databases
 * Vector databases / semantic search (e.g., MongoDB Atlas Search, other vector stores)
 * Hybrid RAG systems (lexical + semantic + knowledge graph)
 * LangGraph4J
 * Building web agents / browser-based autonomous agents
 * Background in AI/ML, NLP, or information retrieval
 * Experience in early-stage startups or very small engineering teams
 * Exposure to UX / frontend; ability to collaborate closely with product/UX

description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive QA Engineer to join our dynamic and collaborative team. This role is ideal for a professional with a strong passion for delivering high-quality software through effective testing strategies, continuous improvement, and close collaboration with cross-functional teams. The QA Engineer will work closely with developers, product owners, and project managers to understand business requirements, define test strategies, and ensure that software solutions meet functional, performance, and quality standards throughout the development lifecycle.




Required Skills & Qualifications

 * 3+ years of professional experience in software quality assurance or testing.
 * Strong understanding of software testing concepts, methodologies, and SDLC/STLC.
 * Hands-on experience with manual testing of web-based applications.
 * Experience with test automation tools and frameworks (e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, TestNG, JUnit, etc.).
 * Knowledge of API testing tools such as Postman or REST Assured.
 * Basic understanding of Java. Python and/or JavaScript for automation scripting.
 * Familiarity with HTML5, CSS3, and browser compatibility testing.
 * Experience working with relational databases and writing basic SQL queries.
 * Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments.
 * Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
 * A proactive mindset with a strong attention to detail and willingness to learn new technologies.
title: Quality Assurance Engineer

description:
Job Description

About the Role We are seeking a highly skilled Senior QA Engineer with strong test automation expertise in the Python tech stack and a deep understanding of US healthcare data ecosystems. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience validating data pipelines, performing data quality checks, and working with Master Data Management (MDM) systems. You will play a key role in ensuring accuracy, reliability, scalability, and compliance of our healthcare data products. Key Responsibilities Test Planning & Strategy


 * Develop comprehensive test strategies for MDM pipelines, APIs, and Client Onboarding applications.
 * Create automation-first QA approaches focused on reliability, traceability, and repeatability.
 * Collaborate with engineering and Business teams to understand requirements and define clear quality criteria.
   
   

Automation & Framework Development


 * Design, develop, and maintain automation frameworks in Python for MDM workflows, data validation, API testing, and backend testing.
 * Implement CI/CD-integrated automated test suites to ensure rapid, reliable deployments.
   
   

Master Data Management (MDM)


 * Test MDM processes for entity resolution, entity merging, and Master record creation.
 * Validate MDM matching/merging logic using deterministic or probabilistic approaches.
 * Ensure MDM workflows integrate correctly with upstream and downstream systems.
   
   

Required Qualifications Technical Skills


 * 5–6+ years of experience in Software QA, with at least 3 years in automation using Python.
 * Strong hands-on experience with Python automation frameworks (e.g., PyTest, Robot Framework, custom frameworks).
 * Advanced SQL skills for validating complex datasets.
 * Working knowledge of API testing tools and frameworks (PyTest, Postman, REST Assured, etc.).
 * Familiarity with Agile development methodologies and tools such as Jira, Git, Bamboo, and bitbucket.
 * Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to work independently or as part of a team.
 * Familiarity with AWS services like CloudFormation, Lambdas, Athena, S3, document DB, etc.
   
   

Domain Expertise


 * 3+ years working with US healthcare data, such as:
    * Claims
    * Eligibility
    * Clinical data
    * Provider/member datasets

 * Understanding of HIPAA requirements and data privacy best practices.

Soft Skills


 * Excellent analytical and problem‑solving abilities.
 * Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with technical and non-technical teams.
 * Self-driven, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering high-quality results.
 * Contributions to process improvement and test automation strategy at a team or organization level.
   
   

Qualifications

Bachelor Degree

description:
Position Summary

Reasons You Will Want This Position


 * We are a rapidly growing company with limitless career growth and advancement for top performers
 * Our culture appreciates and rewards creative ideas, especially those that achieve better outcomes for everyone
 * Work with a team of talented technology professionals who will challenge and help you perform at your best
   
   

Summary

Cedar Gate Services is looking for a few highly skilled Software QA Engineer 2 to join our team. As a Software QA Engineer 2, you will play a key role in ensuring the quality and reliability of our healthcare IT solutions.

Roles & Responsibilities


 * Design and develop comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts based on functional and technical specifications
 * Execute manual and automated tests to validate the functionality, usability, performance, and security of applications
 * Identify, document, and track defects, issues, and risks in defect tracking tools, and work closely with the development team to ensure timely resolution
 * Stay up to date with industry best practices, emerging technologies, and trends in software quality assurance, and propose process improvements and innovative testing solutions
 * Mentor and provide guidance to junior QA engineers, share knowledge and contribute to the continuous improvement of the QA team's skills and capabilities
 * Contribute to the creation and maintenance of QA documentation, including test plans, test cases, and test reports
   
   

Required Experience / Qualifications


 * Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
 * 5+ years of relevant experience
 * Experience in Test Management, Test Automation Tools, and Defect Tracking Tools
 * Solid understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile methodologies
 * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify, reproduce, and isolate defects
 * Strong knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools, and processes
 * Strong attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality software solutions
 * Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
 * Familiarity with programming languages such as Java, C#, or Python
 * Experience with performance testing tools/ methodologies
 * Knowledge of API testing will be plus
 * Knowledge of at least one DBMS
   
   

Preferences


 * Background in US healthcare and claim payment processes, including knowledge of industry standards such as HIPAA and experience with healthcare claims processing systems, is a plus
   
   

Your Future Working Environment

If you join Cedar Gate, you can make great ideas happen for some of the world's most dynamic companies. With broad global resources and deep technical know-how, we collaborate with clients to cultivate ideas and deliver results in the medical industry. Choose a career at Cedar Gate and enjoy an innovative environment where challenging and interesting work is part of daily life.

Next to our excellent terms of employment and fringe benefits, we invest considerable resources to provide ongoing training that builds and extends professional, technical, and management skills in all areas. At Cedar Gate, you will operate in a professional environment where teamwork and innovation are immensely encouraged. Together with colleagues, you will work on high-impact projects for many dynamic companies.

About Cedar Gate

Cedar Gate enables payers, providers, employers, and service administrators to excel at value-based care. Our unified technology and services platform enhances and automates data management activities to deliver employer and provider analytics, care management, and payment technology necessary to pursue every payment model and optimize performance in all lines of business. From primary care attribution to bundled payments to capitation, our platform is designed to improve clinical, financial, and operational outcomes for all.

Cedar Gate Services Pvt. Ltd, Nepal, provides software research & development, data analytics, IT infrastructure management and various support services for Cedar Gate Technologies, USA. We employ 750+ professionals in our Sanepa  office. For more information, visit company website at https://cedargate.com/ and follow our FB page at https://www.facebook.com/CGTNepal

title: Software QA Engineer 2

description:
About Us.

PST.AG is a growing medium-sized business with headquarters in the historical city of Weimar, Germany. With continuous coordination with legal authorities from around the world (e.g. customs authorities, export control authorities). PST.AG is the leading provider of customs/global trade data, helping companies from a diverse range of industries.

You are exceptionally talented, bright, and driven people. Razor-sharp eyes for detail push them through their workdays and keep them determined to meet high standards. Does this sound like you? Then you might want to consider a career as our next team member.

We are looking for a motivated IT Administrator to support and improve our 100% Linux, fully self-managed infrastructure (no AWS/cloud). This role is ideal for someone with a solid Linux foundation who enjoys learning, problem-solving, and working independently.

JOB LINK: https://careers.pst.ag/jobs/it-linux-system-administrator-104

What You’ll Do


 * Maintain Linux servers/endpoints (Debian/Ubuntu), networks, VPNs, and internal services.
 * Troubleshoot issues across systems, applications, and networks.
 * Monitor performance, uptime, and security of servers and network infrastructure.
 * Support deployments, updates, automation tasks, and system improvements.
 * Manage firewalls, DNS/DHCP, routing, authentication, and general network configuration.
 * Assist with designing and deploying new services and enhancements.
   
   

What You Need


 * 5+ years of Linux administration experience (Debian/Ubuntu preferred).
 * Experience with scripting/automation and troubleshooting Linux systems.
 * Comfortable working in a small team with minimal supervision.
 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (or equivalent experience).
   
   

Helpful Experience (Nice To Have But Not Required)


 * GitLab/GitHub, Prometheus, Grafana
 * Python, Java, or Node.js
 * PostgreSQL, MySQL, or ArangoDB
 * Firewalls (iptables/nftables), Apache/Nginx, or Apache NiFi
 * REST APIs, Scrapy, self-hosted proxies
 * Interest in AI/LLM tooling or remote-first work
   
   

Working Hours


 * Shifts may end at 3pm Central European Time (CET)
   
   

If you love Linux, enjoy self-hosting, and want to grow your skills across networking, automation, and systems administration, we’d love to hear from you.

description:
At Ultra Tendency, we build intelligent software solutions that create real business impact. We combine strong engineering fundamentals with modern technologies — including AI-powered features — to deliver scalable systems for international clients across three continents.

We are looking for a Fullstack Engineer who enjoys building high-quality applications end-to-end and wants to grow in an international, collaborative environment.

What You’ll Do


 * Develop modern frontend applications using React and Next.js (TypeScript)
 * Build backend services with Python (FastAPI, Flask, or similar)
 * Design and integrate REST APIs
 * Contribute to AI/LLM-powered features and automation workflows
 * Translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions
 * Write clean, maintainable, production-ready code
 * Participate in code reviews and continuously improve engineering standards
 * Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the stack
   
   

You will work with international teams and have real ownership of your features.

What We’re Looking For


 * 3+ years of professional software development experience
 * Strong experience with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
 * Solid backend experience with Python and microservices
 * Experience integrating APIs
 * Independent and structured way of working
 * Clear and proactive communication in English
   
   

Nice to have:


 * Docker & CI/CD experience
 * Exposure to AI/LLM integrations
 * Experience in distributed teams
   
   

What We Offer


 * A global learning community across three continents
 * The opportunity to shape cutting-edge data and AI projects
 * Real ownership and visible impact on international client systems
 * Annual performance reviews focused on collaboration and growth
 * A personalized development plan and clear advancement opportunities
 * Paid certifications and unlimited Udemy Business access
 * Local, virtual, and global team events
   
   

If you’re motivated by building reliable systems, working in an international environment, and continuously improving your craft — we’d love to connect.

Apply now or reach out for a conversation.

ABOUT US

Ultra Tendency is an international premier Data Engineering consultancy for Big Data, Cloud, Streaming, IIoT and Microservices. We design, build, and operate large-scale data-driven applications for major enterprises such as the European Central Bank, HUK-Coburg, Deutsche Telekom, and Europe’s largest car manufacturer. Founded in Germany in 2010, UT has developed a reliable client base and now runs 8 branches in 7 countries across 3 continents.

We do more than just leverage tech, we build it. At Ultra Tendency we contribute source code to +20 open-source projects including Ansible, Terraform, NiFi, and Kafka. Our impact on tech and business is there for anyone to see. Enterprises seek out Ultra Tendency because we solve the problems others cannot.

We love the challenge: together, we tackle diverse and unique projects you will find nowhere else. In our knowledge community, you will be a part of a supportive network, not a hierarchy. Constant learning and feedback are our drivers for stable development. With us you can develop your individual career through work-life balance.



We evaluate your application based on your skills and corresponding business requirements. Ultra Tendency welcomes applications from qualified candidates regardless of race, ethnicity, national or social origin, disability, sex, sexual orientation, or age.

Data privacy statement: Data Protection for Applicants – Ultra Tendency

description:
About Leapfrog

Leapfrog is on a mission to be a role model technology company. Since 2010, we have relentlessly worked on crafting better digital products with our team of superior engineers. We’re a full-stack company specializing in SaaS products and have served over 100 clients with our mastery of emerging technologies.

We’re thinkers and doers, creatives and coders, makers and builders— but most importantly, we are trusted partners with world-class engineers. Hundreds of companies in Boston, Seattle, Silicon Valley, and San Francisco choose us to gain speed, agility, quality, and stability, giving them an edge over their competitors.

About The Role

At Leapfrog, our mission is to be a role model technology company. We want to be trusted partners, world-class engineers, and creative innovators for our clients. We have built well-crafted impactful software solutions for many industries and ecosystems.


 * Set up, maintain, and execute test documentation and standards.
 * Plan and perform end-to-end testing of high complexity features.
 * Creating and expanding automated regression tests.
 * Experienced with managing bug life cycle.
 * Work closely with development teams in an agile environment.
 * Serve as a liaison between developers and product owners, providing feedback on application readiness.
 * Set up a test environment, communicate testing progress, improvements, or corrections to the team throughout the development process.
 * Learn and gain expertise on various tools for performance and security.
 * Assist with production deployment, troubleshooting, and the release process.
 * Follow the company’s coding standards, policies, processes, and working culture.
 * Communicate new ideas, issues, status, and outcomes with supervisor/team and with clients as necessary.
 * Continuous research and learning; discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency.
 * Graduate in Computer Engineering or similar IT background or equivalent practical experience
 * Minimum 2 years of professional experience
 * Good understanding of software test methodologies, best practices and terminology
 * Proven experience utilizing both structured and exploratory testing techniques
 * Good knowledge of object oriented programming concepts
 * Strong desire to work in a quality focused environment, balancing multiple projects responsibilities concurrently with effectiveness and efficiency
 * Good analytical and problem solving abilities
 * Good written and verbal communication skills
 * Good knowledge of agile development methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
 * Good knowledge of UNIX, Gherkin, Jira, Git
 * Knowledge of OWASP security guidelines for web development
 * Knowledge of AWS, Jenkins, and other deployment tools.
   
   
   

🌞 Life at Leapfrog:


 * Work with talented engineers and remarkable professionals in Nepal, the US, and Europe, building state-of-the-art digital health products.
 * Have an amazing career growth plan with support from experienced mentors and unlimited learning opportunities.
 * Be a part of an experienced team—apply the best industry practices, get mentored by experienced professionals, and be ready to mentor the new ones.
 * Get exposure to clients who are leading entrepreneurs and startups from Silicon Valley.
 * Your work will be at the cutting edge of healthcare innovation and make a difference in the lives of thousands of people worldwide.
 * You will get the flexibility to work remotely or in the office— we value accountable freedom.
 * Get growth opportunities, not just in your work. We organize various internal initiatives where you can be a part of a bigger learning community with webinars, knowledge-sharing sessions (KSS), and internal conferences.
 * Be a part of a safe workplace where it’s okay to fail fast— get constructive feedback and grow as you move ahead.
 * Receive recognition for your contributions and the positive impact you create. We always look for opportunities to celebrate our efforts, play games, and have fun together!
 * You will have a lot of fun at Leapfrog— there’ll never be a dull day.
   
   
   

🎁 Benefits and perks:

We believe our people are our greatest strength. With perks and benefits, we intend to offer everything our people need to do their best while maintaining a healthy balance between work and personal life.

Daily Work Support


 * 🏠 Hybrid work: Work from office or home, depending on our flexible roster
 * 💻 Support for resources: Receive a monthly internet and laptop allowance, and request resources for convenient WFH.
 * 📆 5-day workweek: Enjoy weekends off and return refreshed on Mondays.
 * 🍔 Food: Access to healthy meals while on-site.
   
   
   

Professional Growth


 * 📚 'Growth mindset' fund: Investment in your post-grad degree, learning opportunities, and career growth.
 * 👶 Child scholarship: Scholarships for your child in selected schools.
 * 📈 Bi-annual bonus: Get timely festival and company bonuses.
 * 💸 Advance salary: Request salary in advance.
   
   
   

Work/Life Balance


 * ✈️ Paid time-offs: Annual, sick, compensation, and bereavement leaves.
 * 🍼 Maternity leave: 3 months of paid leave, 1 month of unpaid leave, and 90 days of reduced workload.
 * 🐣 Paternity leave: 11 days of paid paternity leave and reduced workload after.
 * 💊 Menstruation leave: 6 days of paid menstruation leave annually.
   
   
   

We take care of you


 * 🌿 Your well-being: Company-funded counseling services from certified therapists as well as COVID care services.
 * 💰 Retirement fund: Social security fund with health and accidental insurance.
   
   
   

Celebrating your efforts


 * 🎉 Engagement and Events: Team lunch/dinner, company outings, and festival celebrations with your favorite co-workers!
 * 😎 Exposure: Visit and work in the States and build better client rapport.
 * 💖 Recognition: In-house awards, appreciation platforms, and 5th-anniversary gifts!

Data Quality Analyst

Job Summary: We are seeking for a Data Quality Analyst to ensure reliability, accuracy, and consistency of datasets used for Artificial Intelligence training and business intelligence systems. The role focuses on auditing datasets, identifying anomalies, resolving inconsistencies, and maintaining high-quality data standards. You will assess dataset completeness, labeling accuracy, formatting consistency, and compliance with project guidelines. This role is essential in preventing model bias, improving prediction reliability, and maintaining trustworthy AI systems.

Key Responsibilities


 * Audit datasets for quality and consistency.
 * Identify data errors and anomalies.
 * Validate annotations and labeling accuracy.
 * Develop data quality checks and validation rules.
 * Monitor dataset integrity across projects.
   
   

Job Requirements


 * Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
 * Must possess a Data validation and auditing skills.
 * Knowledge of data governance concepts.
 * Data Quality Management Certification (advantage)
 * Must be certified as a Google Data Analytics Certification or Microsoft Data Fundamentals, Data Governance or Data Management Certification (optional)
 * 3-5 years’ experience in data quality, analytics, or data operations.

description:
About Us.

PST.AG is a growing medium-sized business with headquarters in the historical city of Weimar, Germany. With continuous coordination with legal authorities from around the world (e.g. customs authorities, export control authorities). PST.AG is the leading provider of customs/global trade data, helping companies from a diverse range of industries.

You are exceptionally talented, bright, and driven people. Razor-sharp eyes for detail push them through their workdays and keep them determined to meet high standards. Does this sound like you? Then you might want to consider a career as our next team member.

We are looking for a motivated IT Administrator to support and improve our 100% Linux, fully self-managed infrastructure (no AWS/cloud). This role is ideal for someone with a solid Linux foundation who enjoys learning, problem-solving, and working independently.

JOB LINK: https://careers.pst.ag/jobs/it-linux-system-administrator-104

What You’ll Do


 * Maintain Linux servers/endpoints (Debian/Ubuntu), networks, VPNs, and internal services.
 * Troubleshoot issues across systems, applications, and networks.
 * Monitor performance, uptime, and security of servers and network infrastructure.
 * Support deployments, updates, automation tasks, and system improvements.
 * Manage firewalls, DNS/DHCP, routing, authentication, and general network configuration.
 * Assist with designing and deploying new services and enhancements.
   
   

What You Need


 * 5+ years of Linux administration experience (Debian/Ubuntu preferred).
 * Experience with scripting/automation and troubleshooting Linux systems.
 * Comfortable working in a small team with minimal supervision.

Helpful Experience (Nice To Have But Not Required)


 * GitLab/GitHub, Prometheus, Grafana
 * Python, Java, or Node.js
 * PostgreSQL, MySQL, or ArangoDB

Working Hours


 * Shifts may end at 3pm Central European Time (CET)
   
   

If you love Linux, enjoy self-hosting, and want to grow your skills across networking, automation, and systems administration, we’d love to hear from you.

Summary

Cedar Gate Services is looking for a few highly skilled Software QA Engineer 2 to join our team. As a Software QA Engineer 2, you will play a key role in ensuring the quality and reliability of our healthcare IT solutions.

Roles & Responsibilities


 * Design and develop comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts based on functional and technical specifications
 * Execute manual and automated tests to validate the functionality, usability, performance, and security of applications
 * Identify, document, and track defects, issues, and risks in defect tracking tools, and work closely with the development team to ensure timely resolution
 * Stay up to date with industry best practices, emerging technologies, and trends in software quality assurance, and propose process improvements and innovative testing solutions
 * Mentor and provide guidance to junior QA engineers, share knowledge and contribute to the continuous improvement of the QA team's skills and capabilities
 * Contribute to the creation and maintenance of QA documentation, including test plans, test cases, and test reports
   
   

Required Experience / Qualifications


 * Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
 * 5+ years of relevant experience
 * Experience in Test Management, Test Automation Tools, and Defect Tracking Tools
 * Solid understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile methodologies
 * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify, reproduce, and isolate defects
 * Strong knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools, and processes
 * Strong attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality software solutions
 * Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
 * Familiarity with programming languages such as Java, C#, or Python

 * Knowledge of at least one DBMS
   
   

Preferences

Your Future Working Environment

If you join Cedar Gate, you can make great ideas happen for some of the world's most dynamic companies. With broad global resources and deep technical know-how, we collaborate with clients to cultivate ideas and deliver results in the medical industry. Choose a career at Cedar Gate and enjoy an innovative environment where challenging and interesting work is part of daily life.

Next to our excellent terms of employment and fringe benefits, we invest considerable resources to provide ongoing training that builds and extends professional, technical, and management skills in all areas. At Cedar Gate, you will operate in a professional environment where teamwork and innovation are immensely encouraged. Together with colleagues, you will work on high-impact projects for many dynamic companies.

About Cedar Gate

Cedar Gate enables payers, providers, employers, and service administrators to excel at value-based care. Our unified technology and services platform enhances and automates data management activities to deliver employer and provider analytics, care management, and payment technology necessary to pursue every payment model and optimize performance in all lines of business. From primary care attribution to bundled payments to capitation, our platform is designed to improve clinical, financial, and operational outcomes for all.

Ltd, Nepal, provides software research & development, data analytics, IT infrastructure management and various support services for Cedar Gate Technologies, USA. We employ 750+ professionals in our Sanepa  office. For more information, visit company website at https://cedargate.com/ and follow our FB page at https://www.facebook.com/CGTNepal

description:
We’re looking for a reliable Back-end Developer to build and enhance modern, high‑quality backend services using C#, ASP.NET Core with solid experience in ORMs such as Entity Framework Core or Dapper. In this role, you’ll design and implement RESTful APIs, improve data workflows, and ensure strong system performance across our platform. You’ll work closely with cross‑functional partners to deliver clean, maintainable backend logic powered by efficient SQL and robust data access patterns. Experience with search technologies like Elasticsearch is a plus but not required. If you enjoy building clear, scalable backend systems and contributing to steady, high‑quality technical improvement, we’d love to meet you.

What You’ll Do


 * Build New Features: Collaborate with Product Managers, Frontend Developers, and fellow Backend Engineers to design and implement new features that enhance functionality, performance, and user experience across our core applications.
 * Modernize Our Architecture: Help lead the transformation of our existing monolithic application into a modern, scalable, service-oriented architecture. You’ll have the opportunity to influence key architectural decisions and implement services that are robust, secure, and maintainable.
 * Embrace Quality & Scale: Contribute to a codebase that’s clean, well-documented, and covered by tests. You’ll write scalable code with a focus on performance, fault-tolerance, and long-term maintainability.
 * Solve Meaningful Problems: Work on real-world challenges in safety, compliance, and operations that have a measurable impact on our customers’ businesses and the well-being of their employees.
 * Thrive in a Supportive Culture: Be part of a small, collaborative engineering team where your ideas are heard, your contributions matter, and your growth is supported.
   
   

Skills You’ll Need


 * C# & ASP.NET Core Expertise: Strong experience building and maintaining backend services and web APIs using C# and ASP.NET Core.
 * API Design & Integration: Solid understanding of REST principles with hands‑on experience designing, integrating, and consuming APIs in production environments.
 * SQL & Database Skills: Ability to write efficient, optimized SQL queries and work confidently with relational databases to ensure performance and data integrity.
 * ORM & Data Access: Good experience with Entity Framework Core or Dapper for data access patterns.
 * Testing: Strong experience in writing unit tests using any of the standard testing frameworks (e.g., MSTest, NUnit, or xUnit).
 * Search Technologies (Nice to Have): Exposure to Elasticsearch or similar search technologies is beneficial but not required.
 * Communication & Collaboration: Strong ability to explain technical decisions, discuss trade‑offs, and work cross‑functionally to deliver reliable backend solutions.
   
   

What You’ll Get


 * Leadership & Growth: Work directly with senior leadership, reporting to the CTO, in an autonomous and entrepreneurial culture with zero bureaucracy.
 * Remote Work & Flexibility: Frontline is a fully distributed organization.

description:
At Ultra Tendency, we build intelligent software solutions that create real business impact. We combine strong engineering fundamentals with modern technologies — including AI-powered features — to deliver scalable systems for international clients across three continents.

We are looking for a Fullstack Engineer who enjoys building high-quality applications end-to-end and wants to grow in an international, collaborative environment.

What You’ll Do


 * Develop modern frontend applications using React and Next.js (TypeScript)
 * Build backend services with Python (FastAPI, Flask, or similar)
 * Design and integrate REST APIs
 * Contribute to AI/LLM-powered features and automation workflows
 * Translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions
 * Write clean, maintainable, production-ready code
 * Participate in code reviews and continuously improve engineering standards
 * Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the stack
   
   

You will work with international teams and have real ownership of your features.

What We’re Looking For


 * 3+ years of professional software development experience
 * Strong experience with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
 * Solid backend experience with Python and microservices
 * Experience integrating APIs
 * Independent and structured way of working
 * Clear and proactive communication in English
   
   

Nice to have:


 * Docker & CI/CD experience
 * Exposure to AI/LLM integrations
 * Experience in distributed teams
   
   

What We Offer


 * A global learning community across three continents
 * The opportunity to shape cutting-edge data and AI projects
 * Real ownership and visible impact on international client systems
 * Annual performance reviews focused on collaboration and growth
 * A personalized development plan and clear advancement opportunities
 * Paid certifications and unlimited Udemy Business access
 * Local, virtual, and global team events
   
   

If you’re motivated by building reliable systems, working in an international environment, and continuously improving your craft — we’d love to connect.

Apply now or reach out for a conversation.

ABOUT US

Ultra Tendency is an international premier Data Engineering consultancy for Big Data, Cloud, Streaming, IIoT and Microservices. We design, build, and operate large-scale data-driven applications for major enterprises such as the European Central Bank, HUK-Coburg, Deutsche Telekom, and Europe’s largest car manufacturer. Founded in Germany in 2010, UT has developed a reliable client base and now runs 8 branches in 7 countries across 3 continents.

We do more than just leverage tech, we build it. At Ultra Tendency we contribute source code to +20 open-source projects including Ansible, Terraform, NiFi, and Kafka. Our impact on tech and business is there for anyone to see. Enterprises seek out Ultra Tendency because we solve the problems others cannot.

We love the challenge: together, we tackle diverse and unique projects you will find nowhere else. In our knowledge community, you will be a part of a supportive network, not a hierarchy. Constant learning and feedback are our drivers for stable development. With us you can develop your individual career through work-life balance.
