description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive QA Engineer to join our dynamic and collaborative team. This role is ideal for a professional with a strong passion for delivering high-quality software through effective testing strategies, continuous improvement, and close collaboration with cross-functional teams. The QA Engineer will work closely with developers, product owners, and project managers to understand business requirements, define test strategies, and ensure that software solutions meet functional, performance, and quality standards throughout the development lifecycle.




Required Skills & Qualifications

 * 3+ years of professional experience in software quality assurance or testing.
 * Strong understanding of software testing concepts, methodologies, and SDLC/STLC.
 * Hands-on experience with manual testing of web-based applications.
 * Experience with test automation tools and frameworks (e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, TestNG, JUnit, etc.).
 * Knowledge of API testing tools such as Postman or REST Assured.
 * Basic understanding of Java. Python and/or JavaScript for automation scripting.
 * Familiarity with HTML5, CSS3, and browser compatibility testing.
 * Experience working with relational databases and writing basic SQL queries.
 * Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments.
 * Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
 * A proactive mindset with a strong attention to detail and willingness to learn new technologies.
title: Quality Assurance Engineer

description:
About Us

Abacus Insights is transforming how data works for health plans. Our mission is simple: make healthcare data usable, so the people responsible for care and cost decisions can act faster, with confidence.

We help health plans break down data silos to create a single, trusted data foundation. That foundation powers better decisions —so plans can improve outcomes, reduce waste, and deliver better experiences for members and providers alike.

Backed by $100M from top investors, we’re tackling big challenges in an industry that’s ready for change. Our platform enables GenAI use cases by delivering clean, connected, and reliable healthcare data that can support automation, prioritization, and decision workflows—and it’s why we are leading the way.

Our innovation begins with people. We are bold, curious, and collaborative—because the best ideas come from working together. Ready to make an impact? Join us and let's build the future together.

About The Role

We are seeking an experienced Senior Data QA Engineer to lead the design and implementation of comprehensive data quality testing strategies for our data platforms and pipelines. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring data integrity, accuracy, and reliability across our data ecosystem through advanced testing methodologies and automation frameworks.

Your Day To Day


 * Design and implement end-to-end data quality testing strategies for data pipelines, ETL/ELT processes, and data warehouses
 * Develop automated data validation frameworks to verify data accuracy, completeness, and consistency
 * Create and maintain data quality metrics, monitor dashboards, and alert mechanisms
 * Perform complex SQL queries to validate data transformations and business logic
 * Design test cases for data ingestion, processing, and consumption layers
 * Collaborate with data engineers, data scientists, and analysts to understand data requirements and quality standards
 * Lead root cause analysis for data quality issues and implement preventive measures
 * Mentor junior QA engineers and establish data testing best practices
   
   

What We're Looking For


 * Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Business Administration, or comparable professional experience
 * Minimum 5 years of data quality assurance expertise within healthcare technology companies or health insurance organizations
 * Proficient in complex data transformation and manipulation techniques
 * Advanced SQL expertise with proven experience in data integration and validation
 * Comprehensive understanding of ETL/ELT workflows and quality assurance methodologies for data processing validation
 * In-depth expertise in data pipeline architecture and implementing quality control frameworks
 * Practical experience with Spark SQL for distributed data processing
 * Extensive knowledge of healthcare data domains including member enrollment, medical claims processing, and prescription drug claims; familiarity with emerging data sources (wellness programs, productivity metrics, and electronic medical records) is advantageous
 * Outstanding verbal and written communication abilities with demonstrated success in managing multiple priorities and delivering on tight timelines
 * Exceptional collaborative and relationship-building capabilities
 * Self-directed professional who excels both as an individual contributor and team player, with proven mentoring experience
 * Hands-on experience with scripting languages, particularly Python and Java
 * Comprehensive expertise in AWS cloud services including S3, EC2, Systems Manager, Athena, and Databricks platform
 * Thorough understanding of software testing methodologies, debugging techniques, and quality assurance protocols
   
   

Nice To Have


 * Experience with Big Data, Snowflake, and ETL test automation
 * Hands‑on API testing experience
 * Healthcare domain knowledge, including HEDIS quality measures
 * Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence concepts with practical application experience in production environments
 * Proficiency in testing automation frameworks and database technologies
   
   

What You’ll Get In Return


 * Competitive Leave & Benefits
 * Comprehensive health coverage
 * Equity for every employee – share in our success
 * Growth-focused environment – your development matters here
   
   

Working Arrangements


 * Standard hours: 9 hours/day, 5 working days
 * Location: Onsite
 * Shift: 10 AM – 7 PM local time
   
   

Our Commitment as an Equal Opportunity Employer

As a mission-led technology company helping to drive better healthcare outcomes, Abacus Insights believes that the best innovation and value we can bring to our customers comes from diverse ideas, thoughts, experiences, and perspectives. Therefore, we dedicate resources to building diverse teams and providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants. Abacus prohibits discrimination and harassment regarding race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.

At the heart of who we are is a commitment to continuously and intentionally building an inclusive culture—one that empowers every team member across the globe to do their best work and bring their authentic selves. We carry that same commitment into our hiring process, aiming to create an interview experience where you feel comfortable and confident showcasing your strengths. If there’s anything we can do to support that—big or small—please let us know.

description:
Position Summary

Reasons You Will Want This Position


 * We are a rapidly growing company with limitless career growth and advancement for top performers
 * Our culture appreciates and rewards creative ideas, especially those that achieve better outcomes for everyone
 * Work with a team of talented technology professionals who will challenge and help you perform at your best
   
   

Summary

Cedar Gate Services is looking for a few highly skilled Software QA Engineer 2 to join our team. As a Software QA Engineer 2, you will play a key role in ensuring the quality and reliability of our healthcare IT solutions.

Roles & Responsibilities


 * Design and develop comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts based on functional and technical specifications
 * Execute manual and automated tests to validate the functionality, usability, performance, and security of applications
 * Identify, document, and track defects, issues, and risks in defect tracking tools, and work closely with the development team to ensure timely resolution
 * Stay up to date with industry best practices, emerging technologies, and trends in software quality assurance, and propose process improvements and innovative testing solutions
 * Mentor and provide guidance to junior QA engineers, share knowledge and contribute to the continuous improvement of the QA team's skills and capabilities
 * Contribute to the creation and maintenance of QA documentation, including test plans, test cases, and test reports
   
   

Required Experience / Qualifications


 * Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
 * 5+ years of relevant experience
 * Experience in Test Management, Test Automation Tools, and Defect Tracking Tools
 * Solid understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile methodologies
 * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify, reproduce, and isolate defects
 * Strong knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools, and processes
 * Strong attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality software solutions
 * Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
 * Familiarity with programming languages such as Java, C#, or Python
 * Experience with performance testing tools/ methodologies
 * Knowledge of API testing will be plus
 * Knowledge of at least one DBMS
   
   

Preferences


 * Background in US healthcare and claim payment processes, including knowledge of industry standards such as HIPAA and experience with healthcare claims processing systems, is a plus
   
   

Your Future Working Environment

If you join Cedar Gate, you can make great ideas happen for some of the world's most dynamic companies. With broad global resources and deep technical know-how, we collaborate with clients to cultivate ideas and deliver results in the medical industry. Choose a career at Cedar Gate and enjoy an innovative environment where challenging and interesting work is part of daily life.

Next to our excellent terms of employment and fringe benefits, we invest considerable resources to provide ongoing training that builds and extends professional, technical, and management skills in all areas. At Cedar Gate, you will operate in a professional environment where teamwork and innovation are immensely encouraged. Together with colleagues, you will work on high-impact projects for many dynamic companies.

About Cedar Gate

Cedar Gate enables payers, providers, employers, and service administrators to excel at value-based care. Our unified technology and services platform enhances and automates data management activities to deliver employer and provider analytics, care management, and payment technology necessary to pursue every payment model and optimize performance in all lines of business. From primary care attribution to bundled payments to capitation, our platform is designed to improve clinical, financial, and operational outcomes for all.

Cedar Gate Services Pvt. Ltd, Nepal, provides software research & development, data analytics, IT infrastructure management and various support services for Cedar Gate Technologies, USA. We employ 750+ professionals in our Sanepa  office. For more information, visit company website at https://cedargate.com/ and follow our FB page at https://www.facebook.com/CGTNepal

title: QA Engineer

description:
Job Description

About the Role We are seeking a highly skilled Senior QA Engineer with strong test automation expertise in the Python tech stack and a deep understanding of US healthcare data ecosystems. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience validating data pipelines, performing data quality checks, and working with Master Data Management (MDM) systems. You will play a key role in ensuring accuracy, reliability, scalability, and compliance of our healthcare data products. Key Responsibilities Test Planning & Strategy


 * Develop comprehensive test strategies for MDM pipelines, APIs, and Client Onboarding applications.
 * Create automation-first QA approaches focused on reliability, traceability, and repeatability.
 * Collaborate with engineering and Business teams to understand requirements and define clear quality criteria.
   
   

Automation & Framework Development


 * Design, develop, and maintain automation frameworks in Python for MDM workflows, data validation, API testing, and backend testing.
 * Implement CI/CD-integrated automated test suites to ensure rapid, reliable deployments.
   
   

Master Data Management (MDM)


 * Test MDM processes for entity resolution, entity merging, and Master record creation.
 * Validate MDM matching/merging logic using deterministic or probabilistic approaches.
 * Ensure MDM workflows integrate correctly with upstream and downstream systems.
   
   

Required Qualifications Technical Skills


 * 5–6+ years of experience in Software QA, with at least 3 years in automation using Python.
 * Strong hands-on experience with Python automation frameworks (e.g., PyTest, Robot Framework, custom frameworks).
 * Advanced SQL skills for validating complex datasets.
 * Working knowledge of API testing tools and frameworks (PyTest, Postman, REST Assured, etc.).
 * Familiarity with Agile development methodologies and tools such as Jira, Git, Bamboo, and bitbucket.
 * Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to work independently or as part of a team.
 * Familiarity with AWS services like CloudFormation, Lambdas, Athena, S3, document DB, etc.
   
   

Domain Expertise


 * 3+ years working with US healthcare data, such as:
    * Claims
    * Eligibility
    * Clinical data
    * Provider/member datasets

 * Understanding of HIPAA requirements and data privacy best practices.

Soft Skills


 * Excellent analytical and problem‑solving abilities.
 * Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with technical and non-technical teams.
 * Self-driven, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering high-quality results.
 * Contributions to process improvement and test automation strategy at a team or organization level.

title: Senior Software Engineer

description:
About Leapfrog

Leapfrog is on a mission to be a role model technology company. Since 2010, we have relentlessly worked on crafting better digital products with our team of superior engineers. We’re a full-stack company specializing in SaaS products and have served over 100 clients with our mastery of emerging technologies.

We’re thinkers and doers, creatives and coders, makers and builders— but most importantly, we are trusted partners with world-class engineers. Hundreds of companies in Boston, Seattle, Silicon Valley, and San Francisco choose us to gain speed, agility, quality, and stability, giving them an edge over their competitors.

About The Role

At Leapfrog, our mission is to be a role model technology company. We want to be trusted partners, world-class engineers, and creative innovators for our clients. We have built well-crafted impactful software solutions for many industries and ecosystems.


 * Set up, maintain, and execute test documentation and standards.
 * Plan and perform end-to-end testing of high complexity features.
 * Creating and expanding automated regression tests.
 * Experienced with managing bug life cycle.
 * Work closely with development teams in an agile environment.
 * Serve as a liaison between developers and product owners, providing feedback on application readiness.
 * Set up a test environment, communicate testing progress, improvements, or corrections to the team throughout the development process.
 * Learn and gain expertise on various tools for performance and security.
 * Assist with production deployment, troubleshooting, and the release process.
 * Follow the company’s coding standards, policies, processes, and working culture.
 * Communicate new ideas, issues, status, and outcomes with supervisor/team and with clients as necessary.
 * Continuous research and learning; discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency.
 * Graduate in Computer Engineering or similar IT background or equivalent practical experience
 * Minimum 2 years of professional experience
 * Good understanding of software test methodologies, best practices and terminology
 * Proven experience utilizing both structured and exploratory testing techniques
 * Good knowledge of object oriented programming concepts
 * Strong desire to work in a quality focused environment, balancing multiple projects responsibilities concurrently with effectiveness and efficiency
 * Good analytical and problem solving abilities
 * Good written and verbal communication skills
 * Good knowledge of agile development methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
 * Good knowledge of UNIX, Gherkin, Jira, Git
 * Knowledge of OWASP security guidelines for web development
 * Knowledge of AWS, Jenkins, and other deployment tools.
   
   
   

🌞 Life at Leapfrog:


 * Work with talented engineers and remarkable professionals in Nepal, the US, and Europe, building state-of-the-art digital health products.
 * Have an amazing career growth plan with support from experienced mentors and unlimited learning opportunities.
 * Be a part of an experienced team—apply the best industry practices, get mentored by experienced professionals, and be ready to mentor the new ones.
 * Get exposure to clients who are leading entrepreneurs and startups from Silicon Valley.
 * Your work will be at the cutting edge of healthcare innovation and make a difference in the lives of thousands of people worldwide.
 * You will get the flexibility to work remotely or in the office— we value accountable freedom.
 * Get growth opportunities, not just in your work. We organize various internal initiatives where you can be a part of a bigger learning community with webinars, knowledge-sharing sessions (KSS), and internal conferences.
 * Be a part of a safe workplace where it’s okay to fail fast— get constructive feedback and grow as you move ahead.
 * Receive recognition for your contributions and the positive impact you create. We always look for opportunities to celebrate our efforts, play games, and have fun together!
 * You will have a lot of fun at Leapfrog— there’ll never be a dull day.
   
   
   

🎁 Benefits and perks:

We believe our people are our greatest strength. With perks and benefits, we intend to offer everything our people need to do their best while maintaining a healthy balance between work and personal life.

Daily Work Support


 * 🏠 Hybrid work: Work from office or home, depending on our flexible roster
 * 💻 Support for resources: Receive a monthly internet and laptop allowance, and request resources for convenient WFH.
 * 📆 5-day workweek: Enjoy weekends off and return refreshed on Mondays.
 * 🍔 Food: Access to healthy meals while on-site.
   
   
   

Professional Growth


 * 📚 'Growth mindset' fund: Investment in your post-grad degree, learning opportunities, and career growth.
 * 👶 Child scholarship: Scholarships for your child in selected schools.
 * 📈 Bi-annual bonus: Get timely festival and company bonuses.
 * 💸 Advance salary: Request salary in advance.
   
   
   

Work/Life Balance


 * ✈️ Paid time-offs: Annual, sick, compensation, and bereavement leaves.
 * 🍼 Maternity leave: 3 months of paid leave, 1 month of unpaid leave, and 90 days of reduced workload.
 * 🐣 Paternity leave: 11 days of paid paternity leave and reduced workload after.
 * 💊 Menstruation leave: 6 days of paid menstruation leave annually.
   
   
   

We take care of you


 * 🌿 Your well-being: Company-funded counseling services from certified therapists as well as COVID care services.
 * 💰 Retirement fund: Social security fund with health and accidental insurance.
   
   
   

Celebrating your efforts


 * 🎉 Engagement and Events: Team lunch/dinner, company outings, and festival celebrations with your favorite co-workers!
 * 😎 Exposure: Visit and work in the States and build better client rapport.
 * 💖 Recognition: In-house awards, appreciation platforms, and 5th-anniversary gifts!

description:

You will work closely with design and development teams to bring Figma designs to life, ensuring flawless QA and SEO optimisation, while driving a performance score of 90+ across all Lighthouse metrics (Performance, Best Practices, SEO, Accessibility). Your ability to solve complex problems, work efficiently, and integrate third-party APIs is essential.




Location: Remote (Brisbane-based Digital Marketing Agency)

Working Hours: 5:45 AM – 2:15 PM (Monday – Friday)




Responsibilities of the Candidate:




 * Develop and maintain responsive and high-quality WordPress and Shopify websites, translating Figma designs into clean, bug-free code.

If you enjoy dissecting systems, identifying inefficiencies, and strengthening technical foundations while thinking long-term, this role is for you.




Engagement Type

Part-Time (4 hours/day, 6 days/week) (Can convert to full time too)

Remote-friendly




Key Responsibilities

 * Conduct structured codebase audits across multiple stacks (frontend, backend, database, APIs, infra where applicable)
 * Evaluate system architecture, scalability, and maintainability
 * Identify technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and security vulnerabilities
 * Provide clear, actionable audit reports with improvement roadmaps
 * Collaborate with engineering teams to align code quality with business goals
 * Support R&D initiatives by exploring new technologies, tools, and architectural patterns
 * Recommend best practices in CI/CD, version control, testing, and documentation
 * Assist in technical decision-making at a strategic level




What We’re Looking For

 * 3+ years of experience with multi-stack (web, backend frameworks, databases, APIs, cloud preferred)
 * Proven experience auditing or reviewing production-level systems
 * Startup mindset: proactive, ownership-driven, adaptable
 * Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
 * Strong understanding of scalable system design principles
 * Experience working in fast-paced, evolving environments
 * Ability to translate technical findings into business-impact insights.

description:
Job Description

We are looking for a skilled Mid‑Level Software Developer (4+ years) to join the Shared Services Asset team. You will design, build, and maintain cloud‑based applications, working in an agile environment to deliver performant, scalable, and reliable solutions. The role also includes supporting production systems and collaborating closely with cross‑functional teams.

Responsibilities


 * Design, develop, and maintain cloud‑native applications and services.
 * Build high‑quality, resilient software using practices such as TDD and DDD.
 * Work with OpenSearch, DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, including SQL performance analysis.
 * Contribute to infrastructure and deployments using AWS (EKS, Lambda, EC2).
 * Implement, test, and deploy new features and improvements.
 * Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and estimation.
 * Collaborate with developers, QA, PM, and business stakeholders.
 * Provide documentation as needed and support Agile ceremonies.
 * Support and troubleshoot production systems; participate in on‑call rotations when required.
 * Produce clear, maintainable, well‑documented code and technical artifacts.
 * Stay up to date with industry trends and continuously improve development processes.
   
   

Qualifications


 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent experience).
 * 4+ years of professional software development experience.
 * Strong proficiency in .NET (C#) and AWS cloud services.
 * Experience with OpenSearch, DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server.
 * Knowledge of RESTful APIs, JSON, CSV, TSV.
 * Experience with containerized/cloud environments (EKS, Lambda, EC2).
 * Solid understanding of software engineering principles and design patterns.
 * Experience with Agile (Scrum/Kanban).
   
   

About Us

Our People, Our Culture

For more than 50 years, Verisk has helped property and casualty insurers make smarter decisions about risk through AI-powered risk modeling, advanced analytics, and technology solutions spanning the entire policy lifecycle. We are a leading strategic data, analytics, and technology partner to the global insurance industry, guided by core values of learning, caring, and results while maintaining the highest ethical standards as stewards of the industry's most comprehensive datasets. Learn more about Verisk and what we are doing within the insurance industry.

When you join Verisk, you become part of a diverse global team with over 7,500 professionals in 30 plus countries, making work that matters. We're certified by Great Place to Work, reflecting our commitment to inclusivity, employee engagement, and wellbeing. At Verisk, your growth is a priority—from professional development and tuition benefits to a supportive, flexible workplace culture, we support your continued growth.

Our Culture : Explore our inclusive, people-first culture that fosters innovation, collaboration, and belonging.

Awards & Recognition : See why Verisk is consistently recognized as a Great Place to Work™ around the world.

Our Businesses : Learn about the diverse industries we serve — from insurance and energy to financial services and beyond.

Life at Verisk : Discover what it’s like to work at Verisk through employee stories, team highlights, and culture moments.

Careers at Verisk : Join a global team of problem-solvers and innovators doing meaningful work that’s shaping the future of industries. Whether you're just starting out or looking to take your career to the next level, Verisk offers growth, purpose, and a people-first culture

Let’s build something meaningful together!

Verisk Analytics is an equal opportunity employer.

All members of the Verisk Analytics family of companies are equal opportunity employers. We consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, citizenship, sex, gender identity and/or expression, sexual orientation, veteran's status, age or disability. Verisk’s minimum hiring age is 18 except in countries with a higher age limit subject to applicable law.

description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive QA Engineer to join our dynamic and collaborative team. This role is ideal for a professional with a strong passion for delivering high-quality software through effective testing strategies, continuous improvement, and close collaboration with cross-functional teams. The QA Engineer will work closely with developers, product owners, and project managers to understand business requirements, define test strategies, and ensure that software solutions meet functional, performance, and quality standards throughout the development lifecycle.




Required Skills & Qualifications

 * 3+ years of professional experience in software quality assurance or testing.
 * Strong understanding of software testing concepts, methodologies, and SDLC/STLC.
 * Hands-on experience with manual testing of web-based applications.
 * Experience with test automation tools and frameworks (e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, TestNG, JUnit, etc.).
 * Knowledge of API testing tools such as Postman or REST Assured.
 * Basic understanding of Java. Python and/or JavaScript for automation scripting.
 * Familiarity with HTML5, CSS3, and browser compatibility testing.
 * Experience working with relational databases and writing basic SQL queries.
 * Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments.
 * Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
 * A proactive mindset with a strong attention to detail and willingness to learn new technologies.
title: Quality Assurance Engineer

description:
About Us

Abacus Insights is transforming how data works for health plans. Our mission is simple: make healthcare data usable, so the people responsible for care and cost decisions can act faster, with confidence.

We help health plans break down data silos to create a single, trusted data foundation. That foundation powers better decisions —so plans can improve outcomes, reduce waste, and deliver better experiences for members and providers alike.

Backed by $100M from top investors, we’re tackling big challenges in an industry that’s ready for change. Our platform enables GenAI use cases by delivering clean, connected, and reliable healthcare data that can support automation, prioritization, and decision workflows—and it’s why we are leading the way.

Our innovation begins with people. We are bold, curious, and collaborative—because the best ideas come from working together. Ready to make an impact? Join us and let's build the future together.

About The Role

We are seeking an experienced Senior Data QA Engineer to lead the design and implementation of comprehensive data quality testing strategies for our data platforms and pipelines. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring data integrity, accuracy, and reliability across our data ecosystem through advanced testing methodologies and automation frameworks.

Your Day To Day


 * Design and implement end-to-end data quality testing strategies for data pipelines, ETL/ELT processes, and data warehouses
 * Develop automated data validation frameworks to verify data accuracy, completeness, and consistency
 * Create and maintain data quality metrics, monitor dashboards, and alert mechanisms
 * Perform complex SQL queries to validate data transformations and business logic
 * Design test cases for data ingestion, processing, and consumption layers
 * Collaborate with data engineers, data scientists, and analysts to understand data requirements and quality standards
 * Lead root cause analysis for data quality issues and implement preventive measures
 * Mentor junior QA engineers and establish data testing best practices
   
   

What We're Looking For


 * Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Business Administration, or comparable professional experience
 * Minimum 5 years of data quality assurance expertise within healthcare technology companies or health insurance organizations
 * Proficient in complex data transformation and manipulation techniques
 * Advanced SQL expertise with proven experience in data integration and validation
 * Comprehensive understanding of ETL/ELT workflows and quality assurance methodologies for data processing validation
 * In-depth expertise in data pipeline architecture and implementing quality control frameworks
 * Practical experience with Spark SQL for distributed data processing
 * Extensive knowledge of healthcare data domains including member enrollment, medical claims processing, and prescription drug claims; familiarity with emerging data sources (wellness programs, productivity metrics, and electronic medical records) is advantageous
 * Outstanding verbal and written communication abilities with demonstrated success in managing multiple priorities and delivering on tight timelines
 * Exceptional collaborative and relationship-building capabilities
 * Self-directed professional who excels both as an individual contributor and team player, with proven mentoring experience
 * Hands-on experience with scripting languages, particularly Python and Java
 * Comprehensive expertise in AWS cloud services including S3, EC2, Systems Manager, Athena, and Databricks platform
 * Thorough understanding of software testing methodologies, debugging techniques, and quality assurance protocols
   
   

Nice To Have


 * Experience with Big Data, Snowflake, and ETL test automation
 * Hands‑on API testing experience
 * Healthcare domain knowledge, including HEDIS quality measures
 * Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence concepts with practical application experience in production environments
 * Proficiency in testing automation frameworks and database technologies
   
   

What You’ll Get In Return


 * Competitive Leave & Benefits
 * Comprehensive health coverage
 * Equity for every employee – share in our success
 * Growth-focused environment – your development matters here
   
   

Working Arrangements


 * Standard hours: 9 hours/day, 5 working days
 * Location: Onsite
 * Shift: 10 AM – 7 PM local time
   
   

Our Commitment as an Equal Opportunity Employer

As a mission-led technology company helping to drive better healthcare outcomes, Abacus Insights believes that the best innovation and value we can bring to our customers comes from diverse ideas, thoughts, experiences, and perspectives. Therefore, we dedicate resources to building diverse teams and providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants. Abacus prohibits discrimination and harassment regarding race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.

At the heart of who we are is a commitment to continuously and intentionally building an inclusive culture—one that empowers every team member across the globe to do their best work and bring their authentic selves. We carry that same commitment into our hiring process, aiming to create an interview experience where you feel comfortable and confident showcasing your strengths. If there’s anything we can do to support that—big or small—please let us know.

description:
E-commerce Conversion Specialist | Remote (Growth Concierge)

At TalentPop App, we are dedicated to helping high-growth e-commerce brands turn website traffic into maximum revenue. We firmly believe that data-driven experimentation is the ultimate path to explosive growth.

We are looking for a highly analytical and results-driven E-commerce Conversion Specialist. This vital role focuses on optimizing the entire customer journey, from first click to final purchase, to boost the conversion rate and profitability of the brands we partner with.

If you are a talented self-starter who excels at analyzing user behavior and driving measurable results in a fast-paced e-commerce environment, we want to hear from you!

Key Responsibilities: Analysis, Optimization, and Revenue

Your daily focus will be maximizing both Customer Experience (CX) and key conversion metrics:


 * Conversion Strategy: Develop, prioritize, and manage a robust A/B testing roadmap focused on key performance indicators (KPIs) like Conversion Rate (CR), Average Order Value (AOV), and Revenue Per Visitor (RPV).
 * Friction Point Identification: Utilize tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Hotjar) to conduct deep quantitative and qualitative analysis of user behavior, identifying friction points on product pages, cart, and checkout.
 * A/B Test Execution: Design, set up, and execute A/B and multivariate tests end-to-end, ensuring statistical rigor and valid, actionable conclusions are drawn.
 * UX/UI Recommendation: Work collaboratively with design and development teams to recommend and implement winning test variations that permanently improve the User Experience (UX).
 * Reporting & Insights: Accurately track all test results and optimization data, contributing to reporting that identifies winning strategies and drives organizational learning.
   
   

Candidate Requirements


 * Mandatory Experience: 1+ years of proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) or E-commerce Analytics is essential.
 * E-commerce Proficiency: Must be comfortable and experienced with the tools and metrics of high-growth e-commerce (e.g., AOV, LTV, CR, familiarity with Shopify or similar platforms).
 * Analytical & Data Skills: Outstanding ability to interpret complex data sets, formulate testing hypotheses, and calculate statistical significance.
 * Tech Savvy: Familiarity with A/B testing platforms (e.g., VWO, Google Optimize, Optimizely) and key web analytics software (Google Analytics/GA4) is a significant advantage.
 * Work Environment: Must be a highly motivated self-starter comfortable thriving in a remote, high-performance setting.
   
   

Technical Setup Requirements (Remote)


 * A dedicated personal computer or laptop (i5 processor or modern equivalent).
 * A stable, high-speed internet connection (minimum 15 Mbps download and upload speed).
 * A quiet, professional workspace suitable for conducting clear, uninterrupted calls and video meetings.
   
   

Why Join TalentPop App?


 * Incentive Pay: Opportunity to earn commissions and performance bonuses in addition to your base salary.
 * Work Flexibility: 100% permanent work-from-home setup—zero commute required.
 * Benefits: Comprehensive health coverage (HMO or monthly stipend) and paid time off.
 * Growth: Clear paths for career advancement and professional skill development within a supportive team.
   
   

APPLICATION FAST-TRACK: IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED!

To ensure your application is reviewed directly by the Recruitment Team, you MUST follow these critical steps exactly. Applications that do not follow these instructions WILL NOT be reviewed.


 * Select Position: When applying, please choose “Brand Concierge” from the list of available roles.
 * Enter Code: In the application form, you must enter the unique code GCS in the designated application code field.
   
   

Ready to be the data-driven engine behind top E-commerce brands? Apply now to become our next E-commerce Conversion Specialist!

 * UX/UI Recommendation: Work collaboratively with design and development teams to recommend and implement winning test variations that permanently improve the User Experience (UX).
 * Reporting & Insights: Accurately track all test results and optimization data, contributing to reporting that identifies winning strategies and drives organizational learning.
   
   

Candidate Requirements


 * Mandatory Experience: 1+ years of proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) or E-commerce Analytics is essential.
 * E-commerce Proficiency: Must be comfortable and experienced with the tools and metrics of high-growth e-commerce (e.g., AOV, LTV, CR, familiarity with Shopify or similar platforms).
 * Analytical & Data Skills: Outstanding ability to interpret complex data sets, formulate testing hypotheses, and calculate statistical significance.
 * Tech Savvy: Familiarity with A/B testing platforms (e.g., VWO, Google Optimize, Optimizely) and key web analytics software (Google Analytics/GA4) is a significant advantage.
 * Work Environment: Must be a highly motivated self-starter comfortable thriving in a remote, high-performance setting.
   
   

Technical Setup Requirements (Remote)


 * A dedicated personal computer or laptop (i5 processor or modern equivalent).
 * A stable, high-speed internet connection (minimum 15 Mbps download and upload speed).
 * A quiet, professional workspace suitable for conducting clear, uninterrupted calls and video meetings.

 * Work Flexibility: 100% permanent work-from-home setup—zero commute required.

description:
About the role:




Dogma Group is a future-forward digital transformation partner helping organizations build innovative and sustainable solutions across CRM, ERP, AI, Data, Cloud, and product ecosystems. We take pride in our values, culture of collaboration, and a team that thrives on creativity, continuous learning, and customer-focused design thinking.

We are seeking a highly creative and detail-oriented Mid-Level Product Designer who can lead end‑to‑end design processes: from user research and ideation to high‑fidelity design and final delivery. In this role, you will work closely with cross‑functional teams to translate business requirements and user needs into intuitive, visually engaging, and scalable product experiences across web and mobile platforms.




What you'll do:

 * Lead end-to-end design processes from research and ideation to wireframes, prototypes, and final UI designs
 * Conduct user research, usability testing, and competitor analysis to inform design decisions
 * Translate business requirements and user needs into elegant, functional design solutions
 * Create user flows, information architecture, wireframes, high-fidelity mockups, and interactive prototypes
 * Maintain and evolve the company’s design system and UI standards
 * Collaborate closely with product managers, developers, and stakeholders to ensure design feasibility and consistency
 * Provide mentorship and design guidance to junior designers
 * Ensure accessibility, responsiveness, and usability best practices across all digital platforms
 * Continuously stay updated on design trends, tools, and emerging technologies
 * Leverage AI‑powered design tools (e.g., Figma AI, Adobe Firefly, Diagram, Magician) to accelerate ideation, wireframing, content generation, and component creation, ensuring faster and more efficient design workflows







Required Skills and Competencies:

 * 3–5 years of experience as a Product Designer / UI/UX Designer.
 * Strong portfolio showcasing web and/or mobile product design work.
 * Proficiency in Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or similar design tools.
 * Solid understanding of UX research methods, interaction design, and visual design principles.
 * Experience creating user flows, wireframes, responsive layouts, and interactive prototypes.
 * Understanding of design systems, accessibility standards (WCAG), and component-based design.
 * Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and business teams.
 * Strong communication skills with the ability to articulate design decisions clearly.
 * Detail-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving and analytical skills.




Preferred skillset:

 * Familiarity with front-end technologies (HTML/CSS/JS) for improved collaboration with developers.
 * Experience designing SaaS platforms, enterprise tools, or complex workflows.
 * Exposure to AI-powered design tools or automation.
   

Why join Dogma Group?

 * Collaborative and innovative work culture.
 * Opportunities for continuous learning and career growth.
 * Work on UK based projects with a talented multi-disciplinary team.
title: Product Designer

description:
JOB DESCRIPTION: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT

Job Title: Executive Assistant

Designation: Executive Assistant

Reports to: Chief Executive Officer

Location: Chandol, Kathmandu, Nepal

Shift: Standard (09:00 AM to 05:00 PM), Sunday to Fridayâ€¯

Position Overview

As the Executive Assistant (EA) to the Chief Executive Officer, you will play a critical role in supporting the CEO across strategic, managerial, financial, and operational functions. Reporting directly to the CEO, this position acts as a trusted partner and first point of contact, ensuring seamless coordination of executive priorities.

The Executive Assistant serves as a liaison between the CEO, Board of Directors, senior management, and external stakeholders. The role requires high discretion, strong financial understanding, and the ability to support managerial decision-making, oversee special projects, and represent the CEO when required. The position also requires openness to frequent travel in support of business needs.

Roles And Responsibilities

Executive & Managerial Support


 * Report directly to the CEO and assist in all managerial, strategic, and operational roles as assigned.
 * Provide sophisticated calendar and schedule management for the CEO; prioritize meetings, resolve conflicts, and ensure optimal use of executive time.
 * Work closely with the CEO to keep them informed of upcoming commitments, deadlines, and responsibilities, following up proactively.
 * Act as the CEOâ€™s representative where required and coordinate across departments to ensure execution of management decisions.
   
   

Administrative & Coordination Support


 * Handle a wide range of administrative tasks including:
 * Preparing reports, presentations, MIS, and executive summaries
 * Drafting correspondence and official communication
 * Managing travel arrangements, itineraries, expense, and mileage reports
 * Supporting special projects and confidential assignments
 * Serve as the primary point of contact for internal and external stakeholders on matters pertaining to the CEO, including highly confidential or sensitive issues.
 * Exercise sound judgment to determine priorities, responses, and escalation, reflecting the CEOâ€™s leadership style and company policy.
 * Ensure confidentiality
   
   

Cross-functional & External Coordination


 * Maintain open communication with internal teams, including operations, technology, finance, and management teams.
 * Coordinate Executive Team meetings, leadership reviews, offsite meetings, and retreats.
 * Work with senior managers to coordinate the CEOâ€™s outreach activities and follow up on key relationships.
 * Build and maintain long-term internal and external relationships on behalf of the CEO.
 * Finance & Business Support
 * Support the CEO with financial data, reports, budgeting inputs, and management reviews.
 * Assist in preparing presentations and summaries related to financial performance, budgets, and strategic initiatives.
 * Leverage finance knowledge to support decision-making and management discussions.
   
   

Travel & Flexibility


 * Be open and available to travel as required to support the CEO and overall business operations (travel may extend up to 7 consecutive days at a time).
 * Demonstrate flexibility in working hours and responsibilities based on executive and business needs.
 * Perform other duties as assigned by the CEO or line manager.
   
   

Ensure Confidentiality


 * Maintain strict confidentiality at all times regarding company information, communications, and matters pertaining to the CEO.
 * Ensure all documents, discussions, and recordsâ€”both digital and physicalâ€”are handled with discretion.
 * Safeguard sensitive information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.
   
   

Skills And Qualifications

Task Related


 * MBA (preferred) or Bachelor's degree completed; candidates with a Finance or Management background are strongly preferred.
 * 2–3 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Management Assistant, or in a managerial/finance support role.
 * Finance background is mandatory, with the ability to understand financial reports, budgets, and management data.
 * Experience working in an FMCG or fast-paced corporate environment is highly preferred.
   
   

Competencies And Soft Skills


 * Expert proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word); ability to create high-quality executive presentations and reports.
 * Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.
 * Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities independently.
 * Strong decision-making, problem-solving, and analytical abilities.
 * High level of integrity, discretion, and confidentiality.
 * Ability to work with urgency and adapt quickly to changing priorities.
 * Comfortable switching between strategic, financial, and administrative tasks seamlessly.
 * Professional maturity to work closely with senior leadership and external stakeholders.
title: Executive Assisatnt

description:
About Us.

PST.AG is a growing medium-sized business with headquarters in the historical city of Weimar, Germany. With continuous coordination with legal authorities from around the world (e.g. customs authorities, export control authorities). PST.AG is the leading provider of customs/global trade data, helping companies from a diverse range of industries.

You are exceptionally talented, bright, and driven people. Razor-sharp eyes for detail push them through their workdays and keep them determined to meet high standards. Does this sound like you? Then you might want to consider a career as our next team member.

We are looking for a motivated IT Administrator to support and improve our 100% Linux, fully self-managed infrastructure (no AWS/cloud). This role is ideal for someone with a solid Linux foundation who enjoys learning, problem-solving, and working independently.

JOB LINK: https://careers.pst.ag/jobs/it-linux-system-administrator-104

What You’ll Do


 * Maintain Linux servers/endpoints (Debian/Ubuntu), networks, VPNs, and internal services.
 * Troubleshoot issues across systems, applications, and networks.
 * Monitor performance, uptime, and security of servers and network infrastructure.
 * Support deployments, updates, automation tasks, and system improvements.
 * Manage firewalls, DNS/DHCP, routing, authentication, and general network configuration.
 * Assist with designing and deploying new services and enhancements.
   
   

What You Need


 * 5+ years of Linux administration experience (Debian/Ubuntu preferred).
 * Experience with scripting/automation and troubleshooting Linux systems.
 * Comfortable working in a small team with minimal supervision.
 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (or equivalent experience).
   
   

Helpful Experience (Nice To Have But Not Required)


 * GitLab/GitHub, Prometheus, Grafana
 * Python, Java, or Node.js
 * PostgreSQL, MySQL, or ArangoDB
 * Firewalls (iptables/nftables), Apache/Nginx, or Apache NiFi
 * REST APIs, Scrapy, self-hosted proxies
 * Interest in AI/LLM tooling or remote-first work
   
   

Working Hours


 * Shifts may end at 3pm Central European Time (CET)
   
   

If you love Linux, enjoy self-hosting, and want to grow your skills across networking, automation, and systems administration, we’d love to hear from you.
title: Linux System Admin

description:
JOB VACANCY
PWDs and PEOPLE FROM MARGINALIZED
COMMUNITIES ARE ENCOURAGED TO APPLY!
Since 2008, Genashtim has been a for-profit social enterprise dedicated to uplifting marginalized communities. By harnessing the power of technology and the internet, we’ve built a unique virtual employment ecosystem. This network unites individuals from all walks of life—such as people with physical or mental disabilities, refugees, senior citizens, minorities, and others who face barriers to inclusion. Through collaboration, they contribute to a world-class organization that offers exceptional IT remote support, digital learning services and ESG services to clients worldwide.

Job Title: Remote IT Support Specialist
Job Summary:

The role is responsible for providing first-level technical support to internal and external customers by diagnosing, resolving, and documenting PC system incidents and service requests. It involves coordinating and escalating issues when necessary, monitoring progress until closure, and ensuring adherence to Service Level Agreements (SLAs). The position requires strong problem-solving skills, effective communication, and a customer-focused approach to maintaining high levels of service quality and client satisfaction.

Job Description and Responsibilities:
 1. Provides first level of support for internal and external customers on PC system incidents and requests using technical and service knowledge.
 2. Assumes ownership for the coordination, investigation and documentation of customer and system incidents.
 3. Perform basic to medium level of diagnosis of problems and incidents and resolving them when appropriate.
 4. Interprets problems or errors and assesses the risk of events and escalates appropriately to protect client services.
 5. Properly document all problems, incidents, requests and follow- up on all of these to ensure customer satisfaction.
 6. Monitors issues until they are closed while demonstrating a good understanding of the customer’s business needs and applying them to the management of system events & incidents.
 7. Execute test plans or scripts while developing and maintaining customer Service Level Agreements (SLAs), handling time and customer satisfaction.

Job Skill and qualifications:
 1. At least 2 years of experience of an IT support role in a remote environment
 2. Proficiency with cloud platforms (Google Workspace and Microsoft 365), latest Windows & Mac operating systems and remote support tools.
 3. Familiar in using AI applications like ChatGPT, Gemini and others.
 4. Able to adapt to flexible time and willing to be assigned on graveyard shift from time to time
 5. Strong understanding and working knowledge of customer resolution management.
 6. Good and above average oral and written communications skills, ability to articulate, comprehend and express oneself in English, both oral and written.
 7. Ability to work creatively and analytically in a problem-solving environment.

PC Requirements: 
As this position is 100% remote, you will be required to provide your own PC/laptop. Our mandatory PC specifications must be adhered to for your application to be fully processed. Genashtim may require you to submit this proof of specifications and reserves the right to conduct an audit before onboarding. Below are the required PC and other related specifications:
 * Wired internet connection.
 * Processor: Intel i5, 11th Gen or Ryzen 5 and higher (TPM compatible)
 * Memory: 16 GB RAM
 * Operating System: Windows 11 Pro (64-bit) or later, MacOS Sonoma or later
 * Storage: 1TB
 * Stable internet connection (at least 20mbps for download speed & 5mbps upload, with a ping of not higher than 50ms). Mobile data and power backup is a must.
 * People with Disabilities (PWD) assisted applications should be duly licensed.

This storage requirement is specific to the Windows environment used for work and does not cover the personal Windows installation.
title: Remote IT Support Specialist

description:

We are looking for a Fullstack Engineer who enjoys building high-quality applications end-to-end and wants to grow in an international, collaborative environment.

What You’ll Do

 * Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the stack
   
   

You will work with international teams and have real ownership of your features.

What We’re Looking For


 * 3+ years of professional software development experience

 * Solid backend experience with Python and microservices
 * Experience integrating APIs
 * Independent and structured way of working
 * Clear and proactive communication in English
   
   

Nice to have:

What We Offer


 * A global learning community across three continents

 * A personalized development plan and clear advancement opportunities

If you’re motivated by building reliable systems, working in an international environment, and continuously improving your craft — we’d love to connect.

Apply now or reach out for a conversation.

ABOUT US

Ultra Tendency is an international premier Data Engineering consultancy for Big Data, Cloud, Streaming, IIoT and Microservices. We design, build, and operate large-scale data-driven applications for major enterprises such as the European Central Bank, HUK-Coburg, Deutsche Telekom, and Europe’s largest car manufacturer. Founded in Germany in 2010, UT has developed a reliable client base and now runs 8 branches in 7 countries across 3 continents.

We do more than just leverage tech, we build it. At Ultra Tendency we contribute source code to +20 open-source projects including Ansible, Terraform, NiFi, and Kafka. Our impact on tech and business is there for anyone to see. Enterprises seek out Ultra Tendency because we solve the problems others cannot.

We love the challenge: together, we tackle diverse and unique projects you will find nowhere else. In our knowledge community, you will be a part of a supportive network, not a hierarchy. Constant learning and feedback are our drivers for stable development. With us you can develop your individual career through work-life balance.



We evaluate your application based on your skills and corresponding business requirements. Ultra Tendency welcomes applications from qualified candidates regardless of race, ethnicity, national or social origin, disability, sex, sexual orientation, or age.

description:
Company: The Pace Infosys

Location: Kathmandu, Nepal

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview

The Pace Infosys is looking to recruit a proactive and results-driven Software Sales Officer to support the growth of our software solutions, particularly HRMS (Human Resource Management System) and CRM (Customer Relationship Management) products. The role involves identifying business opportunities, meeting potential clients, presenting suitable software solutions, and converting leads into long-term clients. The successful candidate should be comfortable engaging with corporate clients and able to understand how technology can improve business processes.

Key Responsibilities


 * Identify and approach potential clients across different industries for HRMS and CRM software solutions.
 * Develop and maintain a strong pipeline of prospective clients through networking, referrals, and direct outreach.
 * Arrange meetings with decision-makers to understand their organisational needs and challenges.
 * Present and demonstrate the company’s software solutions in a clear and professional manner.
 * Prepare proposals, quotations, and follow-up communications with potential clients.
 * Negotiate commercial terms and support the closing of sales agreements.
 * Coordinate with the technical and implementation teams to ensure a smooth onboarding process for new clients.
 * Maintain regular contact with clients to build long-term relationships and identify opportunities for additional services or modules.
 * Keep updated records of sales activities, client meetings, and business opportunities.
 * Provide regular sales updates and market feedback to management.
   
   

Requirements


 * Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Information Technology, or a related field.
 * Prior experience in sales, preferably in software, IT solutions, or business services.
 * Good understanding of business processes and how software solutions can improve operational efficiency.
 * Strong communication and presentation skills.
 * Ability to build professional relationships with corporate clients.
 * Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and achieve sales targets.
 * Basic knowledge of HRMS, CRM, ERP, or similar enterprise software will be an advantage.
   
   

Personal Attributes


 * Professional and confident when dealing with clients.
 * Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills.
 * Well organised with good attention to detail.
 * Positive attitude and willingness to learn.
   
   

What We Offer


 * Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.
 * Opportunity to work with growing enterprise software solutions.
 * Professional development and exposure to corporate clients across different industries.
   
   

Skills: business development,customer service skills,communication,customer service

description:
The IT Hardware & Network Support Officer is responsible for ensuring the smooth operation of all computer hardware, network systems, and related technical infrastructure. The role involves installing, maintaining, and troubleshooting hardware and connectivity systems, supporting studio and broadcast environments, and ensuring system security and reliability. The position requires strong technical expertise, responsiveness under pressure, and the ability to maintain stable operations during live productions.

Key Responsibilities


 * Install, configure, and maintain desktops, laptops, printers, and peripherals
 * Troubleshoot hardware issues and perform system upgrades
 * Manage LAN connectivity, router configuration, and network troubleshooting
 * Provide day-to-day technical support to staff
 * Support live broadcasts by ensuring stable IT and network systems
 * Monitor system performance, security updates, and antivirus protection
 * Assist with server hardware and storage system maintenance
 * Maintain IT inventory, documentation, and technical reports
   
   

Qualifications & Experience


 * Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related field
 * 1–3 years of experience in hardware or IT support
 * Hardware or networking certification (CompTIA A+, Network+, or equivalent) is an advantage
 * Strong knowledge of computer hardware troubleshooting
 * Basic networking knowledge (LAN setup, router configuration)
 * Understanding of server hardware and storage systems
 * Familiarity with studio equipment connectivity is a plus

description:
About Leapfrog

Leapfrog is on a mission to be a role model technology company. Since 2010, we have relentlessly worked on crafting better digital products with our team of superior engineers. We’re a full-stack company specializing in SaaS products and have served over 100 clients with our mastery of emerging technologies.

We’re thinkers and doers, creatives and coders, makers and builders— but most importantly, we are trusted partners with world-class engineers. Hundreds of companies in Boston, Seattle, Silicon Valley, and San Francisco choose us to gain speed, agility, quality, and stability, giving them an edge over their competitors.

About The Role

At Leapfrog, our mission is to be a role model technology company. We want to be trusted partners, world-class engineers, and creative innovators for our clients. We have built well-crafted impactful software solutions for many industries and ecosystems.


 * Set up, maintain, and execute test documentation and standards.
 * Plan and perform end-to-end testing of high complexity features.
 * Creating and expanding automated regression tests.
 * Experienced with managing bug life cycle.
 * Work closely with development teams in an agile environment.
 * Serve as a liaison between developers and product owners, providing feedback on application readiness.
 * Set up a test environment, communicate testing progress, improvements, or corrections to the team throughout the development process.
 * Learn and gain expertise on various tools for performance and security.
 * Assist with production deployment, troubleshooting, and the release process.
 * Follow the company’s coding standards, policies, processes, and working culture.
 * Communicate new ideas, issues, status, and outcomes with supervisor/team and with clients as necessary.
 * Continuous research and learning; discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency.
 * Graduate in Computer Engineering or similar IT background or equivalent practical experience
 * Minimum 2 years of professional experience
 * Good understanding of software test methodologies, best practices and terminology
 * Proven experience utilizing both structured and exploratory testing techniques
 * Good knowledge of object oriented programming concepts
 * Strong desire to work in a quality focused environment, balancing multiple projects responsibilities concurrently with effectiveness and efficiency
 * Good analytical and problem solving abilities
 * Good written and verbal communication skills
 * Good knowledge of agile development methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
 * Good knowledge of UNIX, Gherkin, Jira, Git
 * Knowledge of OWASP security guidelines for web development
 * Knowledge of AWS, Jenkins, and other deployment tools.
   
   
   

🌞 Life at Leapfrog:


 * Work with talented engineers and remarkable professionals in Nepal, the US, and Europe, building state-of-the-art digital health products.
 * Have an amazing career growth plan with support from experienced mentors and unlimited learning opportunities.
 * Be a part of an experienced team—apply the best industry practices, get mentored by experienced professionals, and be ready to mentor the new ones.
 * Get exposure to clients who are leading entrepreneurs and startups from Silicon Valley.
 * Your work will be at the cutting edge of healthcare innovation and make a difference in the lives of thousands of people worldwide.
 * You will get the flexibility to work remotely or in the office— we value accountable freedom.
 * Get growth opportunities, not just in your work. We organize various internal initiatives where you can be a part of a bigger learning community with webinars, knowledge-sharing sessions (KSS), and internal conferences.
 * Be a part of a safe workplace where it’s okay to fail fast— get constructive feedback and grow as you move ahead.
 * Receive recognition for your contributions and the positive impact you create. We always look for opportunities to celebrate our efforts, play games, and have fun together!
 * You will have a lot of fun at Leapfrog— there’ll never be a dull day.
   
   
   

🎁 Benefits and perks:

We believe our people are our greatest strength. With perks and benefits, we intend to offer everything our people need to do their best while maintaining a healthy balance between work and personal life.

Daily Work Support


 * 🏠 Hybrid work: Work from office or home, depending on our flexible roster
 * 💻 Support for resources: Receive a monthly internet and laptop allowance, and request resources for convenient WFH.
 * 📆 5-day workweek: Enjoy weekends off and return refreshed on Mondays.
 * 🍔 Food: Access to healthy meals while on-site.
   
   
   

Professional Growth


 * 📚 'Growth mindset' fund: Investment in your post-grad degree, learning opportunities, and career growth.
 * 👶 Child scholarship: Scholarships for your child in selected schools.
 * 📈 Bi-annual bonus: Get timely festival and company bonuses.
 * 💸 Advance salary: Request salary in advance.
   
   
   

Work/Life Balance


 * ✈️ Paid time-offs: Annual, sick, compensation, and bereavement leaves.
 * 🍼 Maternity leave: 3 months of paid leave, 1 month of unpaid leave, and 90 days of reduced workload.
 * 🐣 Paternity leave: 11 days of paid paternity leave and reduced workload after.
 * 💊 Menstruation leave: 6 days of paid menstruation leave annually.
   
   
   

We take care of you


 * 🌿 Your well-being: Company-funded counseling services from certified therapists as well as COVID care services.
 * 💰 Retirement fund: Social security fund with health and accidental insurance.
   
   
   

Celebrating your efforts


 * 🎉 Engagement and Events: Team lunch/dinner, company outings, and festival celebrations with your favorite co-workers!
 * 😎 Exposure: Visit and work in the States and build better client rapport.
 * 💖 Recognition: In-house awards, appreciation platforms, and 5th-anniversary gifts!
