Role Summary

We are hiring a highly skilled Ecommerce Video Editor (AI-Driven) who understands direct-response content, paid social ads, and conversion-focused storytelling.

This role is not just about editing, it’s about thinking like a marketer.

You must understand:

 * Hooks
 * Retention
 * UGC style formats
 * Performance metrics
 * Creative testing
 * AI-enhanced workflows

We want someone who can edit fast, think strategically, and constantly improve performance through iteration.




What You’ll Do

 * Use AI tools to accelerate ideation, scripting assistance, subtitles, repurposing, and automation.
 * Optimize pacing, hooks, retention, and CTA placement for performance.

 * Continuously test new angles, hooks, and creative styles.
 * Organize assets and manage versioning for creative testing.
 * Collaborate with media buyers and strategists to improve performance based on data.




What We’re Looking For

 * Strong experience editing ecommerce ads (not just aesthetic content).
 * Deep understanding of direct-response marketing.
 * Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, CapCut AI, Descript, etc.).
 * Ability to analyze ad performance and iterate creatives accordingly.
 * High attention to detail and fast turnaround time.

 * Ability to work independently and take ownership.




What Makes You Stand Out

 * Understanding of UGC frameworks and conversion psychology.
 * Familiarity with creative testing methodologies.
 * Proven results (share campaigns or metrics if possible).
 * Ability to think beyond editing and contribute ideas.




Who This Is NOT For

What We Value

 * Proactive problem-solvers.
 * Fast executors.

 * Editors who want to grow into Creative Strategists.




Final Note

If you’re someone who understands that performance > perfection, and you want to work with a team that pushes creative boundaries using AI and strategy, this role is for you.

description:
Senior SEO Specialist

Type: Full-Time

Experience Level: Senior (5+ Years)

Location: Gaushala, Kathmandu

Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior SEO Specialist who views search engines as a puzzle and AI-driven discovery as a playground. You won’t just be "optimising keywords"; you will be architecting a holistic organic presence that spans traditional search, AI Overviews (SGE), and emerging discovery platforms.

The ideal candidate understands that SEO in 2026 is about Authority and Trust, not just backlinks and meta-tags. You’ll lead our organic strategy, ensuring our brand remains the definitive answer to our customers' most pressing questions.

Key Responsibilities

 * AI & SGE Strategy: Optimise content for AI-driven search results and LLM-based discovery to ensure our brand is cited as a primary source.
 * Technical SEO Excellence: Conduct deep-dive audits on site architecture, focusing on Interaction to Next Paint (INP), schema markup, and crawl efficiency for massive datasets.
 * Content Ecosystem Leadership: Collaborate with the content team to implement E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) at scale, moving beyond "SEO writing" to "Expert-led insights."
 * Competitive Intelligence: Use predictive analytics to stay ahead of algorithm shifts and competitor moves before they impact our traffic.
 * Data Orchestration: Build custom dashboards in Looker Studio or BigQuery to merge SEO data with actual business revenue, proving that organic growth is a profit center, not just a vanity metric.

Requirements & Tech Stack

 * Experience

5+ years in SEO with a proven track record of growing organic revenue (not just traffic).

 * Technical Skills

Proficient in Python or SQL for data analysis; advanced knowledge of JavaScript SEO.

 * Tools

Semrush/Ahrefs, Botify/Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, and AI-auditing tools.

 * Strategic Mindset

Ability to translate "we dropped in rankings" into a multi-departmental recovery plan.

 * Communication

You can explain the "why" behind a Core Update to a CEO without using jargon.

What Makes You the Perfect Fit?

"You don't just follow the Google documentation; you read between the lines. You understand that SEO is a long game, but you have the tactical chops to find 'quick wins' in a crowded digital marketplace."

 * You are comfortable working alongside developers to implement complex redirects or headless CMS optimisations.
 * You have a "test and learn" mentality, frequently running A/B tests on titles and schema to see what actually moves the needle.
 * You stay calm when the algorithm shifts because your strategy is built on user value, not loopholes.
title: Search Engine Optimization Specialist

description:
Data Quality Analyst

Job Summary: We are seeking for a Data Quality Analyst to ensure reliability, accuracy, and consistency of datasets used for Artificial Intelligence training and business intelligence systems. The role focuses on auditing datasets, identifying anomalies, resolving inconsistencies, and maintaining high-quality data standards. You will assess dataset completeness, labeling accuracy, formatting consistency, and compliance with project guidelines. This role is essential in preventing model bias, improving prediction reliability, and maintaining trustworthy AI systems.

Key Responsibilities


 * Audit datasets for quality and consistency.
 * Identify data errors and anomalies.
 * Validate annotations and labeling accuracy.
 * Develop data quality checks and validation rules.
 * Monitor dataset integrity across projects.
   
   

Job Requirements


 * Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
 * Must possess a Data validation and auditing skills.
 * Knowledge of data governance concepts.
 * Data Quality Management Certification (advantage)
 * Must be certified as a Google Data Analytics Certification or Microsoft Data Fundamentals, Data Governance or Data Management Certification (optional)
 * 3-5 years’ experience in data quality, analytics, or data operations.
title: Data Analyst

description:
About Vertex Special Technology

Vertex Special Technologies is a leading digital innovation company in Nepal, dedicated to transforming business processes through cutting-edge technology. Established with a vision to deliver world-class full-stack software solutionsâ€”from startups to Fortune 500 enterprisesâ€”we combine IT consultancy excellence with robust product engineering. With a growing global presence across the USA, Nepal, Pakistan, the UK, and Dubai, we empower organizations to achieve operational excellence and accelerate revenue growth through modern, scalable, and impactful tech solutions..

About The Role

We are looking for an MLOps Engineer to build and optimize ML pipelines, productionize ML/LLM models, manage cloud-based ML infrastructure, and ensure smooth deployment, monitoring, and automation. The role involves implementing CI/CD for ML, maintaining model and data health, and defining best practices for scalable and reliable ML operations.


 * Build, manage and scale workflows and MLOPs pipelines for model deployment, monitoring and automation.
 * Partner with data scientists and machine learning engineers to productionize ML and LLM models (including retrieval-augmented generation or similar architectures) and across environments (dev, staging, prod)
 * Implement CI/CD for ML (CI/CD for code, data, and models), including automated tests, model validation, and secure artifact promotion.
 * Monitor model and data health in production (performance, drift, data quality, latency, cost), and define SLOs/alerts with observability tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry).
 * Manage ML infrastructure on cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure), including containers (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and job schedulers (Airflow, Argo, etc.)
 * Optimize Python based components for performance.
 * Optimize infrastructure to support high-performance model execution and scalable experimentation.
 * Define standards, best practices, and reusable components for the MLOps lifecycle and Create and maintain documentation for ML workflows, runbooks, and operational playbooks.
 * Ensure compliance with data privacy, responsible AI, and governance requirements.
   
   

Qualifications

Education: Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

Experience: At least 1+ years (junior) / 3+ years (MID) years experience proven experience in both Machine Learning and python programming.

What We Offer


 * An attractive and competitive compensation package
 * A dynamic engineering culture built on collaboration, agility, and continuous innovation.
 * Ample opportunities to grow your technical expertise and accelerate your career path.
 * Hands-on experience working on global projects and enterprise-scale platforms.
 * Comprehensive benefits including medical coverage, paid leaves, and additional employee perks.
 * A meaningful role where your work directly contributes to impactful, customer-driven solutions.
title: MLOps Engineer

description:
About the role:




Dogma Group is a future-forward digital transformation partner helping organizations build innovative and sustainable solutions across CRM, ERP, AI, Data, Cloud, and product ecosystems. We take pride in our values, culture of collaboration, and a team that thrives on creativity, continuous learning, and customer-focused design thinking.

We are seeking a highly creative and detail-oriented Mid-Level Product Designer who can lead end‑to‑end design processes: from user research and ideation to high‑fidelity design and final delivery. In this role, you will work closely with cross‑functional teams to translate business requirements and user needs into intuitive, visually engaging, and scalable product experiences across web and mobile platforms.




What you'll do:

 * Lead end-to-end design processes from research and ideation to wireframes, prototypes, and final UI designs
 * Conduct user research, usability testing, and competitor analysis to inform design decisions
 * Translate business requirements and user needs into elegant, functional design solutions
 * Create user flows, information architecture, wireframes, high-fidelity mockups, and interactive prototypes
 * Maintain and evolve the company’s design system and UI standards
 * Collaborate closely with product managers, developers, and stakeholders to ensure design feasibility and consistency
 * Provide mentorship and design guidance to junior designers
 * Ensure accessibility, responsiveness, and usability best practices across all digital platforms
 * Continuously stay updated on design trends, tools, and emerging technologies
 * Leverage AI‑powered design tools (e.g., Figma AI, Adobe Firefly, Diagram, Magician) to accelerate ideation, wireframing, content generation, and component creation, ensuring faster and more efficient design workflows







Required Skills and Competencies:

 * 3–5 years of experience as a Product Designer / UI/UX Designer.
 * Strong portfolio showcasing web and/or mobile product design work.
 * Proficiency in Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or similar design tools.
 * Solid understanding of UX research methods, interaction design, and visual design principles.
 * Experience creating user flows, wireframes, responsive layouts, and interactive prototypes.
 * Understanding of design systems, accessibility standards (WCAG), and component-based design.
 * Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and business teams.
 * Strong communication skills with the ability to articulate design decisions clearly.
 * Detail-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving and analytical skills.




Preferred skillset:

 * Familiarity with front-end technologies (HTML/CSS/JS) for improved collaboration with developers.
 * Experience designing SaaS platforms, enterprise tools, or complex workflows.
 * Exposure to AI-powered design tools or automation.
   

Why join Dogma Group?

 * Collaborative and innovative work culture.
 * Opportunities for continuous learning and career growth.
 * Work on UK based projects with a talented multi-disciplinary team.

description:
Job Title: Mid-Level SEO Analyst

Company: Varosa Technology Pvt. Ltd.

Location: Anamnagar, Kathmandu, Nepal

Employment Type: Full-time

Experience Level: 2–4 years

Department: Marketing / Growth

Reports To: Product Owner




Company Description

Varosa Technology Pvt. Ltd., established in 2017, provides comprehensive IT solutions under one roof. The company is driven by highly experienced professionals who specialize in delivering user-friendly, customized software development and consultancy services. Varosa Technology serves international clients across the USA, Qatar, and Australia, and is also involved in local and government projects in Nepal.




In addition to client services, Varosa develops and scales multiple in-house SaaS products, offering an exciting opportunity to work on both service-based and product-led SEO growth.

About the Role

We’re looking for a performance-focused Mid-Level SEO Analyst to help grow organic visibility for our in-house SaaS products. You’ll work closely with content, development, and product teams to improve rankings, traffic, and conversions across international and local markets.




Key Responsibilities

 * Conduct keyword research and search intent mapping for SaaS products and client websites
 * Optimize on-page SEO (meta tags, headers, internal linking, content structure)
 * Identify and fix technical SEO issues (crawlability, indexing, site speed, Core Web Vitals)
 * Collaborate with content writers and product teams to optimize landing pages and blog content
 * Perform SEO audits and create clear implementation roadmaps
 * Track performance using analytics and SEO tools; prepare reports for stakeholders
 * Analyze competitors and uncover organic growth opportunities
 * Support link-building and off-page SEO strategies
 * Monitor algorithm updates and adjust SEO strategies accordingly
 * Assist with international SEO for Australia and Nepal-based projects




Requirements

 * 2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience
 * Strong knowledge of on-page SEO, technical SEO, and basic off-page SEO
 * Experience using Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar tools
 * Working knowledge of HTML/CSS and basic JavaScript for SEO troubleshooting
 * Experience working with CMS platforms (WordPress)
 * Ability to analyze data and convert insights into actionable recommendations
 * Good communication/leadership skills and documentation habits




Nice to Have

 * Experience with SaaS SEO or B2B SEO
 * Experience with international SEO and geo-targeting
 * Knowledge of schema markup and structured data
 * Basic knowledge of SQL
 * Experience collaborating with product and dev teams
title: Mid-Level SEO Analyst

description:
At Ultra Tendency, we build intelligent software solutions that create real business impact. We combine strong engineering fundamentals with modern technologies — including AI-powered features — to deliver scalable systems for international clients across three continents.

We are looking for a Fullstack Engineer who enjoys building high-quality applications end-to-end and wants to grow in an international, collaborative environment.

What You’ll Do


 * Develop modern frontend applications using React and Next.js (TypeScript)
 * Build backend services with Python (FastAPI, Flask, or similar)
 * Design and integrate REST APIs
 * Contribute to AI/LLM-powered features and automation workflows
 * Translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions
 * Write clean, maintainable, production-ready code
 * Participate in code reviews and continuously improve engineering standards
 * Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the stack
   
   

You will work with international teams and have real ownership of your features.

What We’re Looking For


 * 3+ years of professional software development experience
 * Strong experience with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
 * Solid backend experience with Python and microservices
 * Experience integrating APIs
 * Independent and structured way of working
 * Clear and proactive communication in English
   
   

Nice to have:


 * Docker & CI/CD experience
 * Exposure to AI/LLM integrations
 * Experience in distributed teams
   
   

What We Offer


 * A global learning community across three continents
 * The opportunity to shape cutting-edge data and AI projects
 * Real ownership and visible impact on international client systems
 * Annual performance reviews focused on collaboration and growth
 * A personalized development plan and clear advancement opportunities
 * Paid certifications and unlimited Udemy Business access
 * Local, virtual, and global team events
   
   

If you’re motivated by building reliable systems, working in an international environment, and continuously improving your craft — we’d love to connect.

Apply now or reach out for a conversation.

ABOUT US

Ultra Tendency is an international premier Data Engineering consultancy for Big Data, Cloud, Streaming, IIoT and Microservices. We design, build, and operate large-scale data-driven applications for major enterprises such as the European Central Bank, HUK-Coburg, Deutsche Telekom, and Europe’s largest car manufacturer. Founded in Germany in 2010, UT has developed a reliable client base and now runs 8 branches in 7 countries across 3 continents.

We do more than just leverage tech, we build it. At Ultra Tendency we contribute source code to +20 open-source projects including Ansible, Terraform, NiFi, and Kafka. Our impact on tech and business is there for anyone to see. Enterprises seek out Ultra Tendency because we solve the problems others cannot.

We love the challenge: together, we tackle diverse and unique projects you will find nowhere else. In our knowledge community, you will be a part of a supportive network, not a hierarchy. Constant learning and feedback are our drivers for stable development. With us you can develop your individual career through work-life balance.



We evaluate your application based on your skills and corresponding business requirements. Ultra Tendency welcomes applications from qualified candidates regardless of race, ethnicity, national or social origin, disability, sex, sexual orientation, or age.

Data privacy statement: Data Protection for Applicants – Ultra Tendency

description:
Data Quality Analyst

Job Summary: We are seeking for a Data Quality Analyst to ensure reliability, accuracy, and consistency of datasets used for Artificial Intelligence training and business intelligence systems. The role focuses on auditing datasets, identifying anomalies, resolving inconsistencies, and maintaining high-quality data standards. You will assess dataset completeness, labeling accuracy, formatting consistency, and compliance with project guidelines. This role is essential in preventing model bias, improving prediction reliability, and maintaining trustworthy AI systems.

Key Responsibilities


 * Audit datasets for quality and consistency.
 * Identify data errors and anomalies.
 * Validate annotations and labeling accuracy.
 * Develop data quality checks and validation rules.
 * Monitor dataset integrity across projects.
   
   

Job Requirements


 * Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
 * Must possess a Data validation and auditing skills.
 * Knowledge of data governance concepts.
 * Data Quality Management Certification (advantage)
 * Must be certified as a Google Data Analytics Certification or Microsoft Data Fundamentals, Data Governance or Data Management Certification (optional)
 * 3-5 years’ experience in data quality, analytics, or data operations.

description:
About Us.

PST.AG is a growing medium-sized business with headquarters in the historical city of Weimar, Germany. With continuous coordination with legal authorities from around the world (e.g. customs authorities, export control authorities). PST.AG is the leading provider of customs/global trade data, helping companies from a diverse range of industries.

You are exceptionally talented, bright, and driven people. Razor-sharp eyes for detail push them through their workdays and keep them determined to meet high standards. Does this sound like you? Then you might want to consider a career as our next team member.

We are looking for a motivated IT Administrator to support and improve our 100% Linux, fully self-managed infrastructure (no AWS/cloud). This role is ideal for someone with a solid Linux foundation who enjoys learning, problem-solving, and working independently.

JOB LINK: https://careers.pst.ag/jobs/it-linux-system-administrator-104

What You’ll Do


 * Maintain Linux servers/endpoints (Debian/Ubuntu), networks, VPNs, and internal services.
 * Troubleshoot issues across systems, applications, and networks.
 * Monitor performance, uptime, and security of servers and network infrastructure.
 * Support deployments, updates, automation tasks, and system improvements.
 * Manage firewalls, DNS/DHCP, routing, authentication, and general network configuration.
 * Assist with designing and deploying new services and enhancements.
   
   

What You Need


 * 5+ years of Linux administration experience (Debian/Ubuntu preferred).
 * Experience with scripting/automation and troubleshooting Linux systems.
 * Comfortable working in a small team with minimal supervision.
 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (or equivalent experience).
   
   

Helpful Experience (Nice To Have But Not Required)


 * GitLab/GitHub, Prometheus, Grafana
 * Python, Java, or Node.js
 * PostgreSQL, MySQL, or ArangoDB
 * Firewalls (iptables/nftables), Apache/Nginx, or Apache NiFi
 * REST APIs, Scrapy, self-hosted proxies
 * Interest in AI/LLM tooling or remote-first work
   
   

Working Hours


 * Shifts may end at 3pm Central European Time (CET)
   
   

If you love Linux, enjoy self-hosting, and want to grow your skills across networking, automation, and systems administration, we’d love to hear from you.
title: Linux System Admin

description:
Senior Consultant - Technology

Do you want to build the next great international consulting firm?

Meksys is driving digital transformation and redefining what’s possible for businesses across the globe. We are building the backbone that powers tomorrow’s most ambitious companies.

We're looking for a Senior Consultant who brings the strategic depth and client gravitas to match the technical excellence our teams already deliver.

Meksys is built by a rockstar team with 30+ years of international business experience, building and scaling digital applications to millions of users, and building and scaling global operations teams. This is a rare opportunity to join the next rocketship operating across all continents.

What You'll Do


 * Lead client engagements from discovery through delivery, translating ambiguous business problems into clear, actionable solutions
 * Act as strategic advisor to client stakeholders - shaping what gets built and why, not just how
 * Facilitate workshops, design sessions, and executive briefings that drive alignment and decisions
 * Define solution approaches, working models, and governance patterns in collaboration with engineering and product teams
 * Bridge client business needs with Meksys delivery teams, ensuring work is grounded in real outcomes
 * Develop and maintain trusted client relationships that generate long-term partnership and new opportunities
 * Support business development including RFP responses, proposals, and solution blueprinting
 * Conduct industry and client research to identify trends, risks, and opportunities for improvement
 * Produce high-quality strategic deliverables with emphasis on clarity, storytelling, and actionable recommendations
 * Contribute thought leadership and cross-industry perspective to clients and internally
 * Coach and mentor junior team members, helping them grow their client and consulting skills.
   
   

What You Bring


 * 5+ years in management consulting, enterprise software, or a client-facing advisory role
 * Proven ability to run discovery engagements, facilitate stakeholder workshops, and write recommendations that land
 * Fluency in enterprise application domains (ERP, HRM, workforce management, or similar)
 * Comfortable navigating both technical and business conversations with credibility
 * Strong written communication and deliverable quality. You raise the bar in every document you touch
 * Track record of building client trust and identifying new opportunities organically.

description:
About Leapfrog

Leapfrog is on a mission to be a role model technology company. Since 2010, we have relentlessly worked on crafting better digital products with our team of superior engineers. We’re a full-stack company specializing in SaaS products and have served over 100 clients with our mastery of emerging technologies.

We’re thinkers and doers, creatives and coders, makers and builders— but most importantly, we are trusted partners with world-class engineers. Hundreds of companies in Boston, Seattle, Silicon Valley, and San Francisco choose us to gain speed, agility, quality, and stability, giving them an edge over their competitors.

About The Role

At Leapfrog, our mission is to be a role model technology company. We want to be trusted partners, world-class engineers, and creative innovators for our clients. We have built well-crafted impactful software solutions for many industries and ecosystems.


 * Set up, maintain, and execute test documentation and standards.
 * Plan and perform end-to-end testing of high complexity features.
 * Creating and expanding automated regression tests.
 * Experienced with managing bug life cycle.
 * Work closely with development teams in an agile environment.
 * Serve as a liaison between developers and product owners, providing feedback on application readiness.
 * Set up a test environment, communicate testing progress, improvements, or corrections to the team throughout the development process.
 * Learn and gain expertise on various tools for performance and security.
 * Assist with production deployment, troubleshooting, and the release process.
 * Follow the company’s coding standards, policies, processes, and working culture.
 * Communicate new ideas, issues, status, and outcomes with supervisor/team and with clients as necessary.
 * Continuous research and learning; discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency.
 * Graduate in Computer Engineering or similar IT background or equivalent practical experience
 * Minimum 2 years of professional experience
 * Good understanding of software test methodologies, best practices and terminology
 * Proven experience utilizing both structured and exploratory testing techniques
 * Good knowledge of object oriented programming concepts
 * Strong desire to work in a quality focused environment, balancing multiple projects responsibilities concurrently with effectiveness and efficiency
 * Good analytical and problem solving abilities
 * Good written and verbal communication skills
 * Good knowledge of agile development methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
 * Good knowledge of UNIX, Gherkin, Jira, Git
 * Knowledge of OWASP security guidelines for web development
 * Knowledge of AWS, Jenkins, and other deployment tools.
   
   
   

🌞 Life at Leapfrog:


 * Work with talented engineers and remarkable professionals in Nepal, the US, and Europe, building state-of-the-art digital health products.
 * Have an amazing career growth plan with support from experienced mentors and unlimited learning opportunities.
 * Be a part of an experienced team—apply the best industry practices, get mentored by experienced professionals, and be ready to mentor the new ones.
 * Get exposure to clients who are leading entrepreneurs and startups from Silicon Valley.
 * Your work will be at the cutting edge of healthcare innovation and make a difference in the lives of thousands of people worldwide.
 * You will get the flexibility to work remotely or in the office— we value accountable freedom.
 * Get growth opportunities, not just in your work. We organize various internal initiatives where you can be a part of a bigger learning community with webinars, knowledge-sharing sessions (KSS), and internal conferences.
 * Be a part of a safe workplace where it’s okay to fail fast— get constructive feedback and grow as you move ahead.
 * Receive recognition for your contributions and the positive impact you create. We always look for opportunities to celebrate our efforts, play games, and have fun together!
 * You will have a lot of fun at Leapfrog— there’ll never be a dull day.
   
   
   

🎁 Benefits and perks:

We believe our people are our greatest strength. With perks and benefits, we intend to offer everything our people need to do their best while maintaining a healthy balance between work and personal life.

Daily Work Support


 * 🏠 Hybrid work: Work from office or home, depending on our flexible roster
 * 💻 Support for resources: Receive a monthly internet and laptop allowance, and request resources for convenient WFH.
 * 📆 5-day workweek: Enjoy weekends off and return refreshed on Mondays.
 * 🍔 Food: Access to healthy meals while on-site.
   
   
   

Professional Growth


 * 📚 'Growth mindset' fund: Investment in your post-grad degree, learning opportunities, and career growth.
 * 👶 Child scholarship: Scholarships for your child in selected schools.
 * 📈 Bi-annual bonus: Get timely festival and company bonuses.
 * 💸 Advance salary: Request salary in advance.
   
   
   

Work/Life Balance


 * ✈️ Paid time-offs: Annual, sick, compensation, and bereavement leaves.
 * 🍼 Maternity leave: 3 months of paid leave, 1 month of unpaid leave, and 90 days of reduced workload.
 * 🐣 Paternity leave: 11 days of paid paternity leave and reduced workload after.
 * 💊 Menstruation leave: 6 days of paid menstruation leave annually.
   
   
   

We take care of you


 * 🌿 Your well-being: Company-funded counseling services from certified therapists as well as COVID care services.
 * 💰 Retirement fund: Social security fund with health and accidental insurance.
   
   
   

Celebrating your efforts


 * 🎉 Engagement and Events: Team lunch/dinner, company outings, and festival celebrations with your favorite co-workers!
 * 😎 Exposure: Visit and work in the States and build better client rapport.
 * 💖 Recognition: In-house awards, appreciation platforms, and 5th-anniversary gifts!

description:
Position Summary

Reasons You Will Want This Position


 * We are a rapidly growing company with limitless career growth and advancement for top performers
 * Our culture appreciates and rewards creative ideas, especially those that achieve better outcomes for everyone
 * Work with a team of talented technology professionals who will challenge and help you perform at your best
   
   

Summary

Cedar Gate Services is looking for a few highly skilled Software QA Engineer 2 to join our team. As a Software QA Engineer 2, you will play a key role in ensuring the quality and reliability of our healthcare IT solutions.

Roles & Responsibilities


 * Design and develop comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts based on functional and technical specifications
 * Execute manual and automated tests to validate the functionality, usability, performance, and security of applications
 * Identify, document, and track defects, issues, and risks in defect tracking tools, and work closely with the development team to ensure timely resolution
 * Stay up to date with industry best practices, emerging technologies, and trends in software quality assurance, and propose process improvements and innovative testing solutions
 * Mentor and provide guidance to junior QA engineers, share knowledge and contribute to the continuous improvement of the QA team's skills and capabilities
 * Contribute to the creation and maintenance of QA documentation, including test plans, test cases, and test reports
   
   

Required Experience / Qualifications


 * Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
 * 5+ years of relevant experience
 * Experience in Test Management, Test Automation Tools, and Defect Tracking Tools
 * Solid understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile methodologies
 * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify, reproduce, and isolate defects
 * Strong knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools, and processes
 * Strong attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality software solutions
 * Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
 * Familiarity with programming languages such as Java, C#, or Python
 * Experience with performance testing tools/ methodologies
 * Knowledge of API testing will be plus
 * Knowledge of at least one DBMS
   
   

Preferences


 * Background in US healthcare and claim payment processes, including knowledge of industry standards such as HIPAA and experience with healthcare claims processing systems, is a plus
   
   

Your Future Working Environment

If you join Cedar Gate, you can make great ideas happen for some of the world's most dynamic companies. With broad global resources and deep technical know-how, we collaborate with clients to cultivate ideas and deliver results in the medical industry. Choose a career at Cedar Gate and enjoy an innovative environment where challenging and interesting work is part of daily life.

Next to our excellent terms of employment and fringe benefits, we invest considerable resources to provide ongoing training that builds and extends professional, technical, and management skills in all areas. At Cedar Gate, you will operate in a professional environment where teamwork and innovation are immensely encouraged. Together with colleagues, you will work on high-impact projects for many dynamic companies.

About Cedar Gate

Cedar Gate enables payers, providers, employers, and service administrators to excel at value-based care. Our unified technology and services platform enhances and automates data management activities to deliver employer and provider analytics, care management, and payment technology necessary to pursue every payment model and optimize performance in all lines of business. From primary care attribution to bundled payments to capitation, our platform is designed to improve clinical, financial, and operational outcomes for all.

Cedar Gate Services Pvt. Ltd, Nepal, provides software research & development, data analytics, IT infrastructure management and various support services for Cedar Gate Technologies, USA. We employ 750+ professionals in our Sanepa  office. For more information, visit company website at https://cedargate.com/ and follow our FB page at https://www.facebook.com/CGTNepal

description:
JOB VACANCY
PWDs and PEOPLE FROM MARGINALIZED
COMMUNITIES ARE ENCOURAGED TO APPLY!
Since 2008, Genashtim has been a for-profit social enterprise dedicated to uplifting marginalized communities. By harnessing the power of technology and the internet, we’ve built a unique virtual employment ecosystem. This network unites individuals from all walks of life—such as people with physical or mental disabilities, refugees, senior citizens, minorities, and others who face barriers to inclusion. Through collaboration, they contribute to a world-class organization that offers exceptional IT remote support, digital learning services and ESG services to clients worldwide.

Job Title: Remote IT Support Specialist
Job Summary:

The role is responsible for providing first-level technical support to internal and external customers by diagnosing, resolving, and documenting PC system incidents and service requests. It involves coordinating and escalating issues when necessary, monitoring progress until closure, and ensuring adherence to Service Level Agreements (SLAs). The position requires strong problem-solving skills, effective communication, and a customer-focused approach to maintaining high levels of service quality and client satisfaction.

Job Description and Responsibilities:
 1. Provides first level of support for internal and external customers on PC system incidents and requests using technical and service knowledge.
 2. Assumes ownership for the coordination, investigation and documentation of customer and system incidents.
 3. Perform basic to medium level of diagnosis of problems and incidents and resolving them when appropriate.
 4. Interprets problems or errors and assesses the risk of events and escalates appropriately to protect client services.
 5. Properly document all problems, incidents, requests and follow- up on all of these to ensure customer satisfaction.
 6. Monitors issues until they are closed while demonstrating a good understanding of the customer’s business needs and applying them to the management of system events & incidents.
 7. Execute test plans or scripts while developing and maintaining customer Service Level Agreements (SLAs), handling time and customer satisfaction.

Job Skill and qualifications:
 1. At least 2 years of experience of an IT support role in a remote environment
 2. Proficiency with cloud platforms (Google Workspace and Microsoft 365), latest Windows & Mac operating systems and remote support tools.
 3. Familiar in using AI applications like ChatGPT, Gemini and others.
 4. Able to adapt to flexible time and willing to be assigned on graveyard shift from time to time
 5. Strong understanding and working knowledge of customer resolution management.
 6. Good and above average oral and written communications skills, ability to articulate, comprehend and express oneself in English, both oral and written.
 7. Ability to work creatively and analytically in a problem-solving environment.

PC Requirements: 
As this position is 100% remote, you will be required to provide your own PC/laptop. Our mandatory PC specifications must be adhered to for your application to be fully processed. Genashtim may require you to submit this proof of specifications and reserves the right to conduct an audit before onboarding. Below are the required PC and other related specifications:
 * Wired internet connection.
 * Processor: Intel i5, 11th Gen or Ryzen 5 and higher (TPM compatible)
 * Memory: 16 GB RAM
 * Operating System: Windows 11 Pro (64-bit) or later, MacOS Sonoma or later
 * Storage: 1TB
 * Stable internet connection (at least 20mbps for download speed & 5mbps upload, with a ping of not higher than 50ms). Mobile data and power backup is a must.
 * People with Disabilities (PWD) assisted applications should be duly licensed.

This storage requirement is specific to the Windows environment used for work and does not cover the personal Windows installation.

description:
Job Title: Graphic Designer and Video Editor Intern

Location: Nepal (Remote)

Employment Type: Internship




About Us:




We’re Code Mantra, an EdTech start-up redefining how students learn coding, math, robotics, and AI.

Our mission: to build world-class learning experiences that inspire 1M+ young learners across the globe.




About the Role:




We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer & Video Editor who can produce visually compelling designs and engaging video content that strengthens brand identity and captures audience attention.

The ideal candidate is a team player with strong communication skills who can translate written or verbal ideas into impactful visual storytelling across digital platforms.




Educational Qualification:




 * Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Multimedia, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
 * Proven work experience as a Graphic Designer and Video Editor (preferred).
 * Strong portfolio demonstrating creativity, technical expertise, and diverse styles.




Key Responsibilities:




 * Develop creative and innovative design concepts, layouts, and visual assets for various projects that might include logos, branding materials, social media graphics, website elements, etc.
 * Utilize industry-standard graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) or other relevant tools to create and edit designs.
 * Conduct research and gather inspiration from various sources to stay informed about design trends, industry best practices, and competitor analysis.
 * Use the appropriate colors and layouts for each graphic while receiving and incorporating feedback from team members to refine and improve designs.
 * Edit and manipulate video footage to create visually engaging and cohesive videos for YouTube and other social media channels.
 * Understand the narrative and objectives of the video content and develop a storytelling approach through effective sequencing and editing techniques.
 * Edit and mix audio elements, including dialogue, music, and sound effects, to ensure high-quality audio for video projects.
 * Work with copywriters and the creative director to produce the final design.
 * Handle camera on some occasions and capture footage as and when required for the video content.
 * Ensure final graphics and layouts are visually appealing and on-brand.
 * Competitive analysis and making sure to create content according to the latest market trends.
 * Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.




Key Skills Required:




 * Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or other relevant tools.
 * Solid understanding of design principles, typography, color theory, layout composition, and video editing techniques.
 * Creative thinking and the ability to translate concepts into visually appealing designs and engaging videos.
 * Attention to detail and a strong eye for aesthetics.
 * Ability to manage multiple tasks related to designing simultaneously and meet deadlines.
 * Adaptability and willingness to incorporate feedback and make revisions as needed.
 * Knowledge of motion graphics, visual effects, and audio editing is a plus.




Please send your work samples and resume to sonamgupta@codemantra.io




This is a paid internship with the stipend of 10000/- NPR per month.
title: Graphic Designer and Video Editor Intern

The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving brand awareness, student engagement, and lead generation through innovative digital strategies while leading a collaborative marketing team.

Key Responsibilities

➤ Knowledge of Photoshop and basic After Effects

➤ Experience with long-form educational or lecture videos

➤ Strong understanding of video pacing and student engagement

➤ Attention to detail, patience, and ability to follow structured workflows

Nice-to-Have:

➤ Experience with school curriculum-based content

➤ Familiarity with CDC-aligned subjects (Science, Math, English)

➤ Experience in EdTech or LMS platforms

4. 𝑷𝒐𝒔𝒊𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 𝑫𝒆𝒕𝒂𝒊𝒍𝒔 📌

Type: Full-time

Location: Sanepa, Lalitpur

description:
TalentPop is a fast-growing e-commerce support company dedicated to helping brands thrive in today’s digital landscape. As we expand, we’re looking for a creative and results-driven Social Media Marketing Specialist to join our team. If you’re passionate about building engaging online communities, driving brand awareness, and turning followers into customers, we’d love to meet you!

What You’ll Do


 * Develop and execute social media strategies across platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) to grow reach and engagement.
 * Plan, create, and schedule engaging content (graphics, videos, captions, and stories) aligned with brand voice and campaign goals.
 * Monitor performance metrics and optimize campaigns based on insights.
 * Stay up-to-date on trends, competitor activity, and platform updates to keep our content fresh and relevant.
 * Collaborate with the marketing team on integrated campaigns, paid ads, and influencer partnerships.
 * Engage with our online community by responding to comments, messages, and fostering meaningful interactions.
 * Support email and digital marketing initiatives with social-first content ideas.
   
   

What We’re Looking For


 * At least 1 year of experience managing social media accounts for a brand or agency.
 * Strong copywriting and content creation skills with an eye for visual storytelling.
 * Solid understanding of social media analytics and reporting.
 * Familiarity with paid ads, influencer outreach, or SEO is a plus.
 * Highly organized, creative, and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.
   
   

Technical Requirements


 * Stable DSL, Cable, or Fiber internet connection (minimum 15 mbps for both download and upload speed).
 * Personal PC or laptop with a minimum i5 processor.
   
   

What We Offer


 * Annual performance-based salary increases.
 * Health and dental insurance or a monthly health stipend.
 * Paid Time Off.
 * Holiday Bonus.
 * Recognition and performance incentives.
 * Career growth opportunities in a rapidly scaling company.
   
   

Important: To be considered for this position, please make sure to include the following application code in your submission: SMM25. This code helps us quickly identify applicants for the Social Media Marketing Specialist role. Applications submitted without this code may experience delays in processing. Be sure to highlight it clearly when you apply so our recruitment team knows you’ve carefully read the job posting.

Ready to Join Us?

Be part of TalentPop’s mission to help brands grow and succeed online. Apply now and bring your creativity, strategy, and passion for social media to our team!

description:
We are seeking a dynamic, creative, and results-driven mid-level Business Development & Social Media Associate to join our growing team. This role is ideal for a professional with proven experience in business development and digital marketing who can independently drive outreach initiatives while strengthening our brand presence.




The associate will play a key role in identifying and engaging potential clients, building strong business relationships, and contributing directly to revenue growth. In parallel, you will manage our social media presence, create engaging content, design graphics, and execute digital marketing and SEO initiatives aligned with business objectives.




You will be responsible for connecting with potential clients through LinkedIn, email campaigns, and direct calls, while ensuring consistent brand visibility and strategic positioning across digital platforms. This role requires someone who can confidently balance creativity with structured outreach, communication strategy, and performance-driven marketing execution.




We are looking for a proactive, accountable professional who can manage multiple priorities, work independently, and deliver measurable results.







Key Responsibilities

1. Social Media Management

 * Manage and grow company social media accounts (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, etc.)
 * Plan, schedule, and publish content regularly
 * Track analytics, performance metrics, and optimize posts
 * Respond to comments, messages, and inquiries




2. Content Creation & Graphic Design

 * Create posts, reels, videos, and stories
 * Design graphics, promotional materials, and brand visuals using Canva/Adobe tools
 * Write engaging contents for social media, emails, and marketing campaigns
 * Ensure visual and brand consistency across platforms




3. SEO & Digital Marketing

 * Optimize website content for search engines (on-page and off-page SEO).
 * Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and track SEO performance.
 * Assist in executing paid campaigns (Google Ads, social media ads, etc.).
 * Support in developing content strategies to improve online visibility.




4. Business Development & Client Outreach

 * Research and identify potential clients, partnerships, and business opportunities.
 * Conduct digital scans/research to identify potential leads and business opportunities.
 * Conduct outreach via email, LinkedIn, and other professional channels to generate leads.
 * Maintain and update a client database with key prospects and contacts.
 * Collaborate with management to set up meetings, demos, and presentations.




6. Coordination & Reporting

 * Work closely with internal teams to align business development and marketing goals.
 * Prepare regular reports on outreach efforts, lead generation, and marketing performance.
 * Share insights and strategies to improve both business development and digital presence.







Qualifications & Skills

 * Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or a related field (preferred).
 * 1–3 years of experience in business development, client outreach, digital marketing, or social media management.
 * Proven experience managing LinkedIn pages and executing outreach campaigns.
 * Strong understanding of social media platforms, digital trends, and online audience behavior.
 * Knowledge of digital marketing strategies, including SEO fundamentals (keywords, on-page optimization, analytics).
 * Experience with Meta Ads Manager and/or Google Ads.
 * Familiarity with CRM systems and outreach tools (preferred).
 * Proficiency in graphic design tools such as Canva, Photoshop, or Illustrator.
 * Basic video editing skills.
 * Strong research and analytical skills to identify market trends and client opportunities.
 * Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
 * Comfortable handling client calls, outreach, and professional communication.
 * Self-motivated, results-oriented, and capable of managing multiple priorities independently.
 * Familiarity with the AI or tech industry is a plus.

description:
Company Description

At Greenrich ArchiExperts, we specialize in creating architectural solutions that combine functionality, sustainability, and timeless design. Our team handles end-to-end project planning, design, and execution to deliver impactful and efficient results. Using innovative methodologies and advanced tools like Primavera, we ensure every project is a smart and sustainable investment. Whether working on residential, commercial, or institutional projects, Greenrich ArchiExperts strives to build spaces that inspire and endure. Join us to contribute to meaningful projects and create architecture that makes a difference.




About the Role

Greenrich Archiexperts is looking for a creative Content Creator Intern to help produce engaging digital content around architecture, design, sustainability, and the built environment. The role is ideal for someone who enjoys storytelling through visuals, short videos, and social media content.

description:
Job Title: Graphic Designer and Video Editor Intern

Location: Nepal (Remote)

Employment Type: Internship




About Us:




We’re Code Mantra, an EdTech start-up redefining how students learn coding, math, robotics, and AI.

Our mission: to build world-class learning experiences that inspire 1M+ young learners across the globe.




About the Role:




We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer & Video Editor who can produce visually compelling designs and engaging video content that strengthens brand identity and captures audience attention.

The ideal candidate is a team player with strong communication skills who can translate written or verbal ideas into impactful visual storytelling across digital platforms.




Educational Qualification:




 * Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Multimedia, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
 * Proven work experience as a Graphic Designer and Video Editor (preferred).
 * Strong portfolio demonstrating creativity, technical expertise, and diverse styles.




Key Responsibilities:




 * Develop creative and innovative design concepts, layouts, and visual assets for various projects that might include logos, branding materials, social media graphics, website elements, etc.
 * Utilize industry-standard graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) or other relevant tools to create and edit designs.
 * Conduct research and gather inspiration from various sources to stay informed about design trends, industry best practices, and competitor analysis.
 * Use the appropriate colors and layouts for each graphic while receiving and incorporating feedback from team members to refine and improve designs.
 * Edit and manipulate video footage to create visually engaging and cohesive videos for YouTube and other social media channels.
 * Understand the narrative and objectives of the video content and develop a storytelling approach through effective sequencing and editing techniques.
 * Edit and mix audio elements, including dialogue, music, and sound effects, to ensure high-quality audio for video projects.
 * Work with copywriters and the creative director to produce the final design.
 * Handle camera on some occasions and capture footage as and when required for the video content.
 * Ensure final graphics and layouts are visually appealing and on-brand.
 * Competitive analysis and making sure to create content according to the latest market trends.
 * Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.




Key Skills Required:




 * Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or other relevant tools.
 * Solid understanding of design principles, typography, color theory, layout composition, and video editing techniques.
 * Creative thinking and the ability to translate concepts into visually appealing designs and engaging videos.
 * Attention to detail and a strong eye for aesthetics.
 * Ability to manage multiple tasks related to designing simultaneously and meet deadlines.
 * Adaptability and willingness to incorporate feedback and make revisions as needed.
 * Knowledge of motion graphics, visual effects, and audio editing is a plus.




Please send your work samples and resume to sonamgupta@codemantra.io




This is a paid internship with the stipend of 10000/- NPR per month.
title: Graphic Designer and Video Editor Intern

description:
Ecommerce Video Editor (AI-Driven) | Remote | Full-Time

Location: Remote (Global – No Location Restriction)

Compensation: $1,000 – $3,000/month (Based on experience & skill level)




Role Summary

We are hiring a highly skilled Ecommerce Video Editor (AI-Driven) who understands direct-response content, paid social ads, and conversion-focused storytelling.

This role is not just about editing, it’s about thinking like a marketer.

You must understand:

 * Hooks
 * Retention
 * UGC style formats
 * Performance metrics
 * Creative testing
 * AI-enhanced workflows

We want someone who can edit fast, think strategically, and constantly improve performance through iteration.




What You’ll Do

 * Edit high-converting ecommerce ads for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.
 * Produce 3–5 short-form ad creatives per day (UGC, problem-solution, testimonial, etc.).
 * Analyze top-performing ad structures and replicate winning frameworks.
 * Use AI tools to accelerate ideation, scripting assistance, subtitles, repurposing, and automation.
 * Optimize pacing, hooks, retention, and CTA placement for performance.
 * Implement motion graphics, dynamic captions, pattern interrupts, and scroll-stopping visuals.
 * Continuously test new angles, hooks, and creative styles.
 * Organize assets and manage versioning for creative testing.
 * Collaborate with media buyers and strategists to improve performance based on data.




What We’re Looking For

 * Strong experience editing ecommerce ads (not just aesthetic content).
 * Deep understanding of direct-response marketing.
 * Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, CapCut AI, Descript, etc.).
 * Ability to analyze ad performance and iterate creatives accordingly.
 * High attention to detail and fast turnaround time.
 * Strong sense of pacing, hook building, and storytelling for short-form content.
 * Ability to work independently and take ownership.




What Makes You Stand Out

 * Experience scaling brands through paid creatives.
 * Understanding of UGC frameworks and conversion psychology.
 * Familiarity with creative testing methodologies.
 * Proven results (share campaigns or metrics if possible).
 * Ability to think beyond editing and contribute ideas.




Who This Is NOT For

 * Editors who only focus on aesthetics.
 * Editors who wait for detailed instructions for every task.
 * Editors who cannot work fast or adapt to feedback quickly.




What We Value

 * Proactive problem-solvers.
 * Fast executors.
 * Data-driven creatives.
 * People who think like owners.
 * Editors who want to grow into Creative Strategists.




Final Note

If you’re someone who understands that performance > perfection, and you want to work with a team that pushes creative boundaries using AI and strategy, this role is for you.
title: Ecommerce Video Editor (AI-Driven)

title: Video Editor

description:
About Nuventure Nepal Pvt. Ltd.

Nuventure Nepal Pvt. Ltd. is a video editing and content production company based in Sampang Chowk, Lalitpur, Nepal. We work with clients across the global industries to deliver high-quality video content that performs across digital platforms.




About the Role

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor to join our full-time production team. This is a senior-level role for an experienced editor who can independently lead projects from brief to final delivery, bring strong storytelling instincts to every piece of content, and maintain a consistently high creative standard across the team.

What You Will Do

 * Edit and produce high-quality video content for social media, commercial, and corporate clients
 * Lead projects independently from raw footage through to final delivery
 * Apply advanced color grading in Adobe Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve to achieve polished, professional visual tone
 * Create motion graphics and animations that enhance storytelling and elevate content quality
 * Develop compelling hooks and narrative structures that hold attention from the first second
 * Collaborate with creative directors and clients to align on vision, pacing, and feedback
 * Manage multiple projects simultaneously and consistently meet deadlines
 * Mentor and guide junior editors on storytelling, technique, and workflow

What We Are Looking For

 * Minimum 3 years of professional video editing experience
 * Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, including color grading, sequencing, and pacing
 * Extensive skills in motion graphics and animation, particularly in After Effects
 * Strong storytelling ability, understanding of narrative structure, pacing, emotional arc, and audience engagement
 * Proven ability to craft hooks and opening sequences that stop the scroll and hold attention
 * Proficiency in DaVinci Resolve for color finishing
 * Experience with Adobe Audition for audio cleanup and mixing
 * Ability to work independently and manage a full project workload without close supervision
 * Strong communication and collaboration skills
 * A portfolio that clearly demonstrates storytelling range, motion graphics work, and color grading ability

Education

A degree or diploma in Film Production, Motion Graphics, Multimedia, Visual Communication, or a related field is preferred. Equivalent professional training and a strong portfolio will also be considered.

Working Arrangements

This role is open to on-site, remote, or hybrid candidates. Candidates based in or near Lalitpur are encouraged to apply.

What We Offer

 * Full-time employment with a growing production company
 * Creative and collaborative work environment
 * Opportunity to work on diverse, international client projects
 * Flexible working arrangements

How to Apply

Please apply through LinkedIn and include a link to your portfolio or showreel or email at sneha@nuventurenepal.com. Applications without a portfolio link will not be considered.
title: Senior Video Editor
